user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sherry Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHKyZxladoqp2sx22RM7yWXCzpFm3houLim38-lmeQQxxTOWac=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just WOW! Stayed in Glen Arbor for my husband’s 40th birthday and wanted to have a nice quiet meal. Well BLU went above and beyond. First, they sat us at a quiet table facing the water out on their deck, then they handed us custom “Happy Birthday” menus. The Host and Server were very sweet to wish him a happy day. Then to top it off the food was out of this world. He got the Waygu and I got the Duck. We followed it up with the Rum Cake. Would return there in a heartbeat and would gladly recommend to anyone looking for a high end dining experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPR-21qY1jv0vatHNR6_NqspkFBr05jEEX558tX&fid=0x0:0x6b2550ca2c018f77"],"When":"2024-6-21"},{"Name":"Manda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8EQDxCEAl0tBeH7MSNxTSD-LwsJwEyD5NCaMm3dZ6HnFkbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a gem! The service was fantastic and the view was spectacular but the best part is the food. We had steak and fish and it was perfection. The best meal in Glen Arbor, definitely worth the price. We were so impressed! Thank you for this experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOwMnyLVHbXdmVOcFYmHtLwnOZa_yYhIHAl_rgG&fid=0x0:0x6b2550ca2c018f77"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Bryan Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTxM5TPMGUOL9aeXw1_t7ihu-cZvXmUbI8d1gEOdW4A6OROw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had a wonderful anniversary meal at Blu.
The food was outstanding, service was prompt/friendly, and you can not beat the beautiful setting.

We were  a little surprised with the “anniversary treatment.”  We were told if we ordered a desert they would put a candle on it to help celebrate our anniversary.  That was out of character for such a charming fine dining restaurant. A $100 per person meal and a $.01 candle for the anniversary?

Yet we would still go back in a heartbeat based on the setting, food and service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anonny Mouse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLojc_yfupxCf1wzW-pSaqApw7lCQHRfPWLivounkkOIn4N9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ALWAYS love us some Blu! Go multiple times a year.. and can never go wrong! Consistent amazing dishes, attentive staff, romantic ambiance and gorgeous views!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMMMmv9_lX49OaZpC_ClsFreKOFwewo6iEf6V3H&fid=0x0:0x6b2550ca2c018f77"],"When":"2024-12-27"},{"Name":"Maria Hidalgo Dolan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUh1I6BVEXKUxpTavD3KFX08GtaH4ZzYvb5qybLbtauBHfiH-OIHA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Amazing french restaurant in a condo complex overlooking Lake Michigan. Erin our waitress was exceptional. The food was astounding. The wine divine. The problem was how ridiculously loud tables with more than 2 people are. The ceiling is vaulted and the noise ruins the atmosphere. It was also very warm as the sun set as the restaurant has many windows. The maitre de, we were told is the chef/owner's son. He never smiled when we arrived. Never smiled when we left and thanked him. We were perplexed someone in hospitality, especially related to the owner would not have a more engaging demeanor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMA7NywYBrVwYy5TE4V8TQfMGQXWrKfHiwamtvq&fid=0x0:0x6b2550ca2c018f77"],"When":"2023-7-24"},{"Name":"Nicholas P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKDqe5aMUsaxjWnerVfLfIRY1KgMpsjmk8Iz0OwVvlRqFAUsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Unfortunately, we did not have the pleasure of dining in so we had to get take out. The food was still delicious though. We got the crab puffs, rack of lamb, and bouchon. They used to have veal, they should have kept it on there. I liked the crab puffs, very flavorful but for $24 the quantity is lacking. Rack of lamb was cooked beautifully medium rare, a lot of flavor and tender. Bouchon  was very good, not sweet and light.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPk4dhyvYFwvdA6rAtDzOc_2J2rkBBq9LmZeFwe&fid=0x0:0x6b2550ca2c018f77"],"When":"2023-12-16"},{"Name":"Jan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_l2-8aX_MVxmHsMJ4tDv7ZDSd0FQOzeD6lVSs3Rrgkc8xcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Over the top, best dinner experience we've had in a long time! GREAT service (Lauren was knowledgeable & helpful with the menu, and very personable), AMAZING food (we had rack of lamb and veal scallopini and both were very tender & delicious), and BEAUTIFUL setting looking out onto Lake Michigan.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ed G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKoWxWoOu4vfaiJdRjb5mz3BNTl5iWn8oNv7P3Kpb_CyFuHEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A memorable meal. 4 of us shared the duck, lamb, boar, and salad. We started with the crab puff and escargot. The drinks were excellent. From martinis to the Seaplane (made with a bit of duck fat). Finished with the rum cake, creme boule, and Port. Mary, our server was great. We'll be back. Enjoy.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kimberly Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXocQ9fRLhUaP1KzbkMUFUWXUFsFJMjfQb-8AqpKQGyZwwYsJHuPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Such a cute little restaurant with organic, fresh ingredients. Only gave 4 stars because I thought it was a bit pricey and didn't really have much (meat) on the menu. The stuff we ordered was delicious. The board was awesome! You can really see the amazing colors in the food from all the organic ingredients.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMVJxTsauxjKROCpfC8P7bs8utKdTKuRtDvCJyV&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-10-8"},{"Name":"Morgan Murphy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3zrCtAGj_osuPAqcTFrCWe54g1KJVSx-peSXpzb0BoKsuX8Wr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The easiest 5-star rating I have maybe ever done. Wish I could give it 7 stars. We ordered the corn nuts (salty crunch!!!), the toast (without fennel bc of my allergies but it was hearty, soft, creamy, & came with castelvetrano olives), the arugula salad (soft yet sturdy with delicata squash, balsamic, nuts, & cheese), green chili potato soup (tangy broth with carrots came with two lush pieces of soft cornbread), & fried apple pie for dessert. I had two glasses of their sparkling wine, which was drinkable, sparkly, & slightly sweet. My partner had an English ordinary bitter beer, which paired well with the salty corn nuts, in my opinion (based on my little sips).

The staff brought us some freshly prepared chestnuts that were sweet, pulpy, & fresh.

the interior design was calm, cozy, yet energizing. soft lighting & light wood, with a fireplace & plenty of seating around different sizes of tables - art on the walls & a little market with cookbooks, produce, home goods, & merch. It felt very easy to linger. Outside they have seating, tables, some bonfire areas. it was a bit too rainy & chilly for us to step out there but i definitely will the next time im back. im drooling thinking about it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOogO69zcnkvibBLusirAzkQbj8a8Vr-ldaoibu&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-11-23"},{"Name":"John B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXf29Tu0ytTQ5myOpQyMLpHKKHav-pQzULCe7us1D7e-9Zc7Rvy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We got there Saturday morning and put our name in for a table. They were super busy, but seated our party of 5 within 20 minutes. There was a pepper stand outside that was interesting to browse while waiting. There's also a small gift shop-type area inside that had a few items for sale.

We were seated outside, which was pleasant, but the one umbrella for the table left 2 of us sitting directly in the sun, so sunglasses were necessary. The food was excellent, though very expensive. $26 for a chicken salad. Our waitress was attentive and kept the table clear and our waters full. I'd come back for a special occasion, like an anniversary or birthday.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNgNiHweEkFnhfLqGG9VWpKa57hO4DRax_tbgKL&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-10-23"},{"Name":"Chris Vaillant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWZe-80blpzmxxsKUMdqYGqzraOp3KQVn4niOSooIgkNzOp6vb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super popular place. While we did have to weather a one hour wait for a table, that wait was made quite enjoyable in the back garden with a place for beer and very light snacks.

Dinner was beautifully presented, and delicious. While we did have a main server, service was very much a team approach with many faces visiting the table for any reason, but sometimes it was difficult to tell who was staff.

A great place to go for a refreshing meal for a special occasion.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPELqznljRyETK7xaVZK_rDWhGSf55M5WCZ5akf&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-7-15"},{"Name":"Wil Hughes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6-VIx7QmDAhxYbvf7hru41mlQC-qg2qjHmUuyvPt2rNdqPaIB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible experience. Even if there is a wait, the property is beautiful to walk around and the shop has a bespoke selection of delightful goods.

Service and waitstaff was great and had helpful suggestions for such a well thought menu.

The food… wow. Incredible. Massive, well balanced flavors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOvPy5965viHGONtMWR8JR3Dt1kn92e8GGU0oJj&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-7-14"},{"Name":"Lucas Gussman-Toh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhHhYeeOYe0-podHU3TKk9pKBVtsyUbe1OGftsNXUiICh9S-bHRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely time here although it gets crowded during summertime evenings, so expect a 1-2 hour wait as they don’t take reservations. That time passes easily with one of their great beers and walking around the grounds. Really beautiful location and atmosphere. Although the food is really fresh several dishes (orechiette, chicken sandwich, salad) left a lot to be desired—either bland or oversauced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNdtsW8v1j_wAghP3ZjGoGe5P0wXC6qWq-4sC__&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-7-10"},{"Name":"Dinu Madau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4en22M4qeEycA89bGASSgXjg-S1x3XiKMpm5nvcaVaPSCO8dN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best places to eat around Traverse City. Great food, highlighting the creativity of the chef. Expect to get dishes that are unique and delicious.  Lots a vegetarian options and almost all of the vegetables are from their gardens. They also brew their own beer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOy-uNsVgjkLfLkfZrka3tlRljV_UZYGKzn-SA1&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"Ava Fedorov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKUCYlTkEl0vRNzA0Q2OH-1PAY6WOlE13mEd0H6BnGRuyvHgkl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love the whole vibe at Farm Club. Such a unique atmosphere — a bright, modern space in the middle of rolling fields. The service and the food completely matches the vibe — modern, laid back, inventive, farm-forward.

I had a delicious local cider and the turnip plate with hazelnuts and blue cheese. The salad was light and healthy with the richness of the cheese and crunch of the hazelnuts elevating the experience. The service was super sweet and friendly, consisting pretty much entirely of attractive individuals whose style perfectly matched the look and feel of Farm Club.

I also loved that you could easily bike to the restaurant, as it’s right off one of the bike paths.

Next time I’ll definitely buy a loaf of bread, since there was practically a line for their bakery counter the whole time I was there!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM0Q9QR_eBe-GdG5xyw41qiH4uwGbb04w9CEzpv&fid=0x0:0x71f34c67ec73c30e"],"When":"2024-6-12"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Michael Conser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIGQQ__uOnHcPaOu-coHSDxu42S64l2jyzskXhhwKm9LUpjTYt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"What's up with my overall rating not matching for food, service, and atmosphere? Well, it's like this it all boils down to price, presentation, and accommodations on this one. Let me explain; this place is in the middle of nowhere and bills itself as "fine dining," and that may be the perception being in a tourist trap area without a lot of options but damn... our meals were almost $40ea. we were outside on wobbly patio furniture, and due to the fact that they only had parking for maybe 10 cars (being generous), we had to part on the roadside off a busy road. If this establishment had better pricing in line with food quality and presentation and was better accomadated to its customers' needs, it would be a 5 all day, but it's not... It's a firebird that thinks it's a Ferrari. I won't be back. The only saving grace was our server, Maci. She was fantastic! Thank you, Maci!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP7cCnkqLaeZaRQIff88ryA3m5bpzg4e4p6gCZr&fid=0x0:0xc87637700e33eaa8"],"When":"2024-7-4"},{"Name":"Lisa A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzbJsbQjxzTjxspsLOUiD9w0aDhaSq-MEkytbJO_eDhK5ypDTFiw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a delicious experience at the Manitou.

After a day of sightseeing and adventure on the coast, we decided we would like to have a fish dinner and did a Google search for whitefish dinner near me, and The Manitou came up. We drove to the restaurant, having never been before, and the parking lot was packed. Cars were lined up down the road. We made a quick call because the restaurant does accept reservations to see if they could get us in. We arrived on a Wednesday night at 8 pm.

They said they could take our party of 5 immediately! This was a great surprise.

The atmosphere was exactly what we were searching for. Something that screamed Northern Michigan fishing lodge. It was perfect as we were showing friends from New Hampshire all the Michigan charm.

They had lots of fish options, and we opted for the Walleye, Whitefish, and Perch dinners. We also had the oyster appetizers. Everything was so delicious.  We were really pleased with the choices and the service.

Thanks for a great meal!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNDjeWj4gT3JFC_wH7jXlfeg4gHDORv_EaDbJoo&fid=0x0:0xc87637700e33eaa8"],"When":"2023-7-13"},{"Name":"Glo B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQTwRsvKafJJvs64_p-4HwoZzP_qap_o5NVU47uxamtSwV9ybj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a gem! Started with the whitefish appetizer, it was so good I ordered one to take home. Perch dinner was the best I had in a long time! It was perfectly prepared and not overcooked. The Northwoods salad with the cherry vinaigrette was delicious. Finished off with some key lime pie. Manitou did not disappoint.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOz7hCUx589c9zJnJf7xTHtV9hFV7PeQ9kYVpAH&fid=0x0:0xc87637700e33eaa8"],"When":"2023-9-5"},{"Name":"Dan Hendrick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVE_ZHy69VPfrAgT9UM2l6RvYHz9zdyO9XEcODkHM9SsOJp5G-q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This was our first time dinning at the Manitou and it will not be the last.  Very casual feeling restaurant. Good seafood and drinks. My wife and I both had the Trawler.  It’s a delicious combination of broiled whitefish, crab stuffing, U10 Scallops, and 16/20 Shrimp with house veg. dinner salad and rolls.  They cooked it all perfectly, I was very surprised and delighted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMt9PwRACsyShnAAD3Fyrhs6B_wms9mULfMp80x&fid=0x0:0xc87637700e33eaa8"],"When":"2023-7-10"},{"Name":"Chris Hoekstra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4rzzvJG0ZFyqH8wBdAPR0o-DeldqioryQ5M5VmyoelDDPZw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located in the middle of basically nowhere. Make sure you make a reservation. The atmosphere is woodsy! I'm pretty sure the converted an old wood cabin/house into the restaurant! The eating area is very compartmized like house were in the past. There is wood everywhere, but it works here creating a warm if dark atmosphere! Lots of older knick knacks on the wall.

I ordered the M-22 Grill (Market ($28)). A Sirloin Steak marinated in a sweet and savory sauce. I ordered mine medium with Potatoes au Gratin and a Garden Salad. When I sat down the put a bowl down with some slices of cucumber, celery, radish, and carrots with blue cheese dressing. I normally don't care much for these, however maybe it was the blue cheese but I really enjoyed them. The steak came thinly sliced. It was very tender and excellently tasty! For an affordable steak it was top notch. The salad was excellent too. The Au Gratin potatoes were very good, complex potatoes. There was bread too, that was only okay. A little too hard. I prefer very soft bread!

The service was good considering they were getting slammed. One small mistake with the salad dressing, but no big deal.

Overall a 5 star review. Would I return? Absolutely!

Lastly their parking lot is way too small. People have to park along country highway M22. That seems very dangerous when there's so much land around it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP506xtwbIW223KQD7DDK58UQe7vJt0G6GhaGJe&fid=0x0:0xc87637700e33eaa8"],"When":"2021-10-24"},{"Name":"Patricia Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4nLFgBdEWdOKzM7S_-MeCRYyXkJo4Tu6lMaISD0xTOiY9sg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The lake trout was excellent! The side of broccoli and cauliflower vegetables was not great. I didn’t eat it. The side salad was okay. The raspberry/blueberry pie was wonderful! It was a bit overpriced for the whole experience. But I may go back for that fish!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeff Yuchasz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwcyPZA3o6ShvKx0NrBXAj7B_OxzXpwjNfBFTQE4S3rTXMlTFM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great staff (sat at the bar) and Great food! What a friendly place! Everything was delicious. The butternut squash was a real surprise! So good! Thanks for a great evening, and we will be back!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neil Carlson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB2TrTKNJvWBmj2Wq_xlSuVSsq8Cy2VBvzd8RlE_3Av7dpaavS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was exceptional: hot, fresh, flavorful, crisp, as it should be everywhere but almost never is. The fried whitefish was sooo good. Try the whipped squash side, it will make you sigh with delight.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOBsunNBspsFf38tLgYVHxICsFboHFPoUHmU6CJ&fid=0x0:0xc87637700e33eaa8"],"When":"2023-10-12"}]

[{"Name":"Shaun McGowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCImjMhp8P1Oj7_xQokVC1UAZWDJi_qiTp8pVVjXoM6stM5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow!! My wife had the ribeye and I had the Shepard's Pie.
Both were fabulous! The garden salad was fresh and the dinner rolls were hot! We sat in the bar area and the waitress was on top of her game!
The owner even stopped by to check on how we were doing.
Great local fare and great job!!
Thanks","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNITPttk9dzndbNtdNhiO-lewNZ7zSGZzred7io&fid=0x0:0x98b65d495697037"],"When":"2024-7-23"},{"Name":"LayLay Russell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFimVMYV7hoKcDKeJTouWDSdYAr72UCj5_r6bK9hgIMTc3-UX5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great lunch. Their French Onion soup was delicious 😋. I could've had that alone. The Swiss Mushroom burger was terrific 👍. I didn't enjoy the carrot cake though 😞 but I can see myself there again 😀","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNeBtWyNaTsS6bWvMnED2U7EZnfQhsoF3qoDcmt&fid=0x0:0x98b65d495697037"],"When":"2024-5-9"},{"Name":"Sam Adams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2YfrpJ7QhAXGuKgmrcBPQnAO9wybh0WKarr2o43RRr0vELFF25g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful inside, incredible food. Burger was outstanding quality","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPBh0JvX_rLlZXGs2aKyIqcvnjqBQtf6Azp-Fui&fid=0x0:0x98b65d495697037"],"When":"2024-10-11"},{"Name":"Peni Fuji","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmm4y6cLadkDC-E1y5T7eV1JuS9jfw2-tG7OkOCFGIo10m2x_o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Our experience wasn't anything great. Only 2 employees we seen, one was sitting other was running bar, taking orders, cashing out customers, serving food, and tending bar. I understand she was busy, but ... Especially for the overpriced food and it was lunch time. Each time she came to take our order, she just rudely went to other guest she knew and forgot about us. She called them by name and served them before finishing our order. We were getting ready to leave, she did get our order. Hour later we still didn't have food. Once we received our ToGo order, checking our bag. Open face beef had spilled in the bag, paper tore and was mixed in the food. French onion soup, very small cup for price. Burger deffently wasn't worth it's cost. Beef extremely peppery, I couldn't eat it and my husband ate what he could. Now mind you there we're a total of 15 customers, 7 had already been served, so no excuse. Overall, some may be ok with those high prices and small portions, I am not. The best part was the interior itself. Tried something new, didn't work out for us on our date day. Husbands a truck driver, so what time we get, try new places. This was a bust for us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN-JED64idoTzgXIXfrVuRLGjKdESS3Yl9FdmlA&fid=0x0:0x98b65d495697037"],"When":"2024-1-24"},{"Name":"V A Lew","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlzbSVEF2BiBebeVeWjXIXGWjHZZDqSwBuLUl0BWlpUPUuDulFkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I really wanted to like this place. The reviews were good, and a friend of mine told Prime rib wad great. Unfortunately, not much worked out for me. Unfortunately, the theme of the evening was no temperature.  The chili and French onion soup tasted good, but they were warm at best. My filet mignon was still mooing, when I asked for medium.  The steak was not even hot cause the butter never melted. Prime rib was over cooked and chewy, asked medium on that. There was zero pink in the prime rib. The server never came back and asked how the meal was after she dropped it off.The green beans were a little bland. The baked potato was spectacular.  Even deserts were only ok. For the amount of money spent,I WAS HOPING FOR A LOT BETTER!.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNzWTjPOvnOvE3Nzd31oxY3rh8SDTMP8yR8w6gO&fid=0x0:0x98b65d495697037"],"When":"2023-10-14"},{"Name":"Stacey Ward","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVY0l7yrUHLuFDpVpB8mc4-Jo8omjJz_Ovm_AL4uVTODZtvVTYu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was good and came out in a timely manner, with huge portions.  Ribs and wings and rings are made to perfection. There were only 3 stars for the atmosphere because it was very dimly lit where we were seated.  Had to turn on our phone light to see the menu.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Chickowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0tX4jlTjXyC1SWUZFUa9TkfBbnyVFEPNRvnwGA7QzjSQaMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food. Large portions. My husband said his Reuben was one of the best he has ever had…the dressing was outstanding he said. The fish n chips were cooked to perfection and the French onion soup was very good. Our waitress Parker was very attentive and courteous. We will definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie M. (Stelpanie)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUN4ceOfnIW_vNaXC0DG8IHbtzjU1qfXP4IDIvdsxmnXdPJa_j1FQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a nice and off the beaten path kind of place to catch a meal, but our waitress was so fabulous, and the food was great. We even had plenty leftover for our road trip snack back home. I got the club sandwich, and it was great.(and Huge)","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Leiah Shirley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsilAcQ8XrT9tQ-cqtlbeWyuufx2Fqq7ZJ0Ot7bkSb8-16Plk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gorgeous restaurant! Stayed overnight at The Godfrey hotel and this is the restaurant that provides in room service… the menu looked so good we decided to go down for the full experience.

We visited on a Saturday for brunch (no reservations) and were seated right away. The server was very attentive and helpful in making selections for food and drinks.

For my drink, I described what I typically drink (g&t/French 75/aviation etc) and they suggested the “not a word” drink, their play on the last word cocktail - it was great! A nice floral, perfectly balanced drink.

For my main I ordered the Cajun shrimp + grits and shared a plate of the special Strawberry cheesecake pancakes. Both were incredible. Perfectly spicy plump juicy shrimp over fluffy soft polenta. Thick fluffy pancakes with sweet & tangy flavor of strawberry and cream. Perfect little sweet treat.

The rest of the table ordered chicken & waffles with the smooth talk cocktail; shrimp + grits with an espresso martini; and Smashburger plus fries and an IPA.

We all were very happy with our selections and plan to return for dinner soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMCVIrr75zelNKaO1JtLyntSg1UohNe27M9cLns&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2024-12-29"},{"Name":"Matt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4oK6So2H6x3D8W1WfIpMcwTxYqoty6FmLk-cV2RdRBairLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent for brunch, beautiful new decor.  Bar staff takes great care of you.  Had dinner for the first time last night and the food was excellent.  We sat at the bar and again had great service.  The chicken parmesan was a very healthy generous portion and was delicious.  The wine was also very tasty, I'll be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNTbJ8ErLb-slpsJSsWCUpqDzP_tJ8cIDS5j7v3&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2024-11-5"},{"Name":"Jason Halbert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9F1lmCofZiBzrqwSMcbyp7gHXHzfe1zcfttXZsjuOlOWQag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The bar.  What can I say.  Had an amazing bartender “BJ” that was so great.  We had a party of six and made more bar friends yet BJ kept up with us.  The service was perfect and the drinks he make were out of this world.  Please try the heart of glass it’s sooo good.  If you like a a beautiful bar with great bartender (ask for BJ ) and some of the best drinks in Detroit get here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMyIrvbTSAtFacaESF5ZbjpeqElUz0UzJCzQu_i&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Lover Boi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc-D3DgbGbL5URfmxX40ePciItsTfF1GRlTUK2FJEaTYkmSF5O=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The place is really nice but there are a lot of things that were not appreciated, the food portions were small and flavorless, our server Jackie was actually really nice BUT she was always in a rush even though there were not many people dining in, there was even 2 or 3 other servers.  The coffee tasted watered down and old, and our biggest issue was that every guest was seated very close by each other to the point that I could hear everyone's conversation, again the place was not packed at all about 4 or 5 other tables of 2 or 3.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNhTeXpYFyNsmtvdR2pETmcxLVL7dgJaarCieT9&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2024-9-6"},{"Name":"B Willis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcknvhAraEAicLnYeNgCDedTtHRnBPqH4mUaNJgBCRHHpP7k0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My siblings and our first cousin celebrated our 33rd annual “Just Us” gathering at this lovely restaurant on Sunday, 12/29/2024. We did Brunch, and were not disappointed! Perfect seating - three of us are tall folk, and appreciated the height of the round table just inside the hotel entrance to the restaurant.
Our meal selections included “Two Eggs Your Way”, buttermilk pancakes, a fantastic BLT with garlic aioli, good tasting bacon, pork and chicken sausages and English muffins with raspberry per-serves. My Bloody Mary was really good as was the coffee and OJ. This place is comfortable and even cozy in a bright, well-lit way.
Big kudos to our hostess SYDNEY(sp) and NOLAN, our server. Pure professionalism and just plain nice people!  We shall spread the word, and return for Dinner! Thank you!
- B. Willis","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Starnes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHIH4jNGeCsFQacpeUAKlgVauhVie7I4-B9GMFwXAtp8WNdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped in for breakfast on my way to work. BJ was my server/bartender, who was friendly, knowledgeable, we chatted about the recent local train station opening. Ordered the breakfast sausage sandwich, side of home fries and bacon. The home fries were crispy and the sandwich was very filling. The hotel is beautiful and has a spacious lobby, with a good bourbon selection, which i didn’t get a chance to dive into. I think this is a great addition to the Corktown area, and will definitely have to visit again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOsmStE1MkFEZfml5gso8zxVEr-2Z1nnYySibcR&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2024-7-9"},{"Name":"Danielle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYqctpA8aEDRo5dlURiyYawEfXG5DVecPG1daTFe_07f3i-bzX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tamiko was lovely. She was attentive, knowledgeable and had great energy. Service was excellent. Food was delicious the ambience in the decor of the restaurant were stunning. I appreciated the nice chill mellow music playing. Bathrooms were beautiful. Every staff member was so polite and friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOqOV7ru3TsMxgkWMPoD3_juk_dOArwxNSIPO5S&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2023-12-23"},{"Name":"Odetha Hollis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMaemls7xAYykC2O6Ag6KD_u3yZhFqZq-qsQYva2fx9cN9Nyw7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My young ladies and I enjoyed a Welcome Home Brunch and much needed break together. Service and food were excellent! Thank you 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO0iAr7TGnQ5KM9RbROi1tcRYL5RaW2VAPldjXH&fid=0x0:0xe79c1ca350a901ef"],"When":"2024-7-1"}]

[{"Name":"Jason Lukas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoSSlsO6zoUDGdZaHmPNjbJ5kWkdpr7D41qrA17WXTh3nHez1z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Weak-Sauce!   This was a bust. Over priced for mediocre farm-to-table Italian cuisine in an interesting setting. Multiple meals felt like the “meat” was over done and tough. Some pasta was “chewy” while others were bland. Even a simple cocktail was served “flat”.  To make matters more difficult our server was challenged with answering the most basic questions. Shame as we had high hopes as it came highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOhlocRXyxeW0CPe8StabHXG_Fr73nXCbRy5kQy&fid=0x0:0xda207fee5e383853"],"When":"2024-10-28"},{"Name":"Su Faw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLUhmdLuYQ-BFeOv95-lhdPB0JkeOfP1MKWJXS5wivpaBtKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"During our visit, we ordered the ravioli and the fettuccine. The ravioli was delightful, with a rich and flavorful filling that we thoroughly enjoyed. However, the fettuccine was disappointing as it was served with meat and potatoes, an unusual and unappealing combination. We would not order the fettuccine again.

On a positive note, the ambiance of the restaurant was lovely, creating a pleasant dining atmosphere. The service was amazing, with attentive and friendly staff who made our visit enjoyable.

Overall, while the ravioli and service were highlights, the fettuccine left much to be desired.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOwQSzx7N-mObkE7P9CrI9Dmtkn0XUxR_Tlhzuy&fid=0x0:0xda207fee5e383853"],"When":"2024-7-12"},{"Name":"Dan A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLza3vJvacq0F4jqQcIuMe0uoSPPgLH_La85V_DOA9fJxXgXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went here for my anniversary with my wife 10 years ago and it was amazing. We decided to go again this year for our anniversary and we're not disappointed. We've tried several different items and they are all amazing every time. Classy establishment, but with class comes price. Still not terrible though. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN4P0eSP2iMuNh1XLPXEsLN8O641CrnNIsSLesh&fid=0x0:0xda207fee5e383853"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"NR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKc98lJkhDYZ8RDvskwaVjgKeVzeqMvE_lJ8l0kidK2dLayUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a way to start a fantastic weekend trip to Traverse City!  I used to be a sous-chef when I was a younger buck, and it takes a lot for a restaurant to totally impress me like Trattoria Stella did for both of us.  Every dish we had was perfectly balanced, beautifully presented, and the flavors were 100% spot on.  The house made hot sauce served with the oysters even surprised me with a perfect balance of butter and heat (not even close to Buffalo sauce).  The weekly special of Foie gras was cooked in clarified butter, with a perfect crust that melted in our mouths, and the caramelized onions were a great touch to pair side by side.  Both of our of our entrées (pan roasted chicken and sea scallops) were amazing, and the desserts we ordered were exactly what we hoped for.  My goodness Trattoria Stella, from the greeting at the door, the outstanding service and amazing food made for an unforgettable dining experience, neither of us will soon forget.  Seriously, thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPSTblk-vx-ODnDKVYc9-bW9GH3W9iN4V6S9Mx_&fid=0x0:0xda207fee5e383853"],"When":"2024-7-25"},{"Name":"Jenna Riley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdYdqBua55iEDQDYHry6Nsw8NAOMvg_gggugtz6OlTvk0FtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have eaten here several times in 2024 and they were all excellent experiences. Very good wine menu and pairing advice from service staff, excellent specials. I would eat here weekly or more if I could. Absolutely phenomenal. You won’t find much like this in Northern Michigan. It stands above them all.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carole Ronan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX48RkBohqiOYHScvJ4i1NzNqeEj9WIRtqEQit21KBt_qYzu7S8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This is my go to restaurant every time I’m in the area and I usually rave to family and friends. I was just in twice within a few week period and each experience left me questioning if I will return as I feel like the service and food have declined. My October visit for my birthday they were featuring a lobster tail with mussels (5) on a bed of risotto and I found my lobster tail to be small and slightly overcooked and on the lukewarm side  - for $75, I was a bit surprised it came out like this but our appetizers were good as was the wine and the dish was still flavorful so I was fine eating it. I also loved our server but as the restaurant became busier, there was a very lengthy period where we weren’t checked on to the point where we all definitely would’ve gotten another drink. Almost $700+ for 4 people and I’m sorry but the service and food need to be almost perfect. This past time (last weekend), was what made me second guess if I will be back. We came in as a larger group for a family ladies trip and were seated in the bar area. I had told everyone they were going to love it and right off the bat our server seemed to be annoyed. Her helpers were wonderful but she was very condescending. My food (I had the bone in veal) was once again lukewarm and half the table enjoyed their meals but the other half felt the same about things being lukewarm and not as flavorful as they hoped. I was embarrassed that I talked the restaurant up so much but the rude service towards a group who spent the amount of money we did was just so off putting that I will have a hard time returning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe Todd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSqyPaoQl9mMsfwjUu18ToTly43ATwZF2e5Nohu5PwuLX9AoTsFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the second time we've come here and it was excellent again.  We had reservations but they were very busy and we had to wait a bit.  It's not a big deal.  Once we were seated, we had a couple of cocktails and the cheese board, then as entrees, I had the spaghetti, and my wife had the pork chop.  Both were excellent.  This was another great experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOYV6zaMfmiwt0q-5nt46kj2vEeqc9yf9vpf2NP&fid=0x0:0xda207fee5e383853"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Olivia Swanson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWG3DNFkTnqsIbQu6CP9qgiHjzTbyVNQIO3lzpqseWuSLj6IY1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was 10/10. Each course was so well thought out and the flavors were amazing. The food quite literally melted in our mouths and we just could not get enough. The service was also 10/10. Shelby took AMAZING care of us and her recommendations were spot on. She was extremely knowledgeable about the menu and she was also super personable! We dine at many nice restaurants, but Trattoria Stella has definitely ended up on our top 3 favorite places to eat!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Andrea Lisi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzEx5xQD4Pv3rHGw5HgWQZ8rZfMBelrfP-vdGpEaSRSBIpfma4Gw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a truly delightful dinner experience. The ambience was enchanting, with soft lighting and tasteful decor that created a warm and inviting atmosphere.

The wine selection was impressive, featuring a variety of exquisite options to complement our meal perfectly. The staff were exceptionally welcoming and attentive, making us feel right at home.

As for the food, it was nothing short of spectacular, with each dish bursting with flavor and beautifully presented.

We will be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPMFdvtipE94tZd3NWL5O-kVH8iuLy7W7hplb7l&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Claire Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9VTfwdXoqfYwAXhtFVPMxeQmG8CFTPkCP-rkF3XGa08q8SA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was absolutely delicious! We had the duck duo, panko breaded whitefish with seasonal baked veggies and kale salad. The scallops were also amazing. We loved the salsa made on top of it with a very subtle cumin flavour. Joel was super friendly and helpful! We will come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMDrSgoW7R4QZuT8t1IIBzB0Y8PxZVzAQrfM16S&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2024-10-10"},{"Name":"Sarah Horness","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZqJQgNv3XLaBse-imbH0gAfupEerEvSJNFJ-IkL5OSG169w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went for the happy hour. My Leelanau 75 was delicious and potent. We had a selection of appetizers. All delicious but especially recommend their version of deviled eggs","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOUQSeqTCzaiIoHOna0Co2aVBgQ5LF1L_GNqtWP&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2024-8-6"},{"Name":"Spider Goat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCqi8hTWgZ4O4NWmohuFbCmZ0dVb-Kxrl4EgpoA_9s1O--5sbH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Took the family here for birthday gathering and it was a great experience. The staff was very attentive and the owner was very accommodating. Everyone at the table enjoyed their dishes, which can be tough to win everyone over, so that was an accomplishment. They had a nice selection of wines and drinks. They served a birthday cake that was WONDERFUL, and was an excellent finale to the meal.  If we are in that area again we will be sure to make reservations again. Well done.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPbCSTdcInF0KL41qeqsWDyQ3FasvQ9LjNYnAqt&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2018-12-9"},{"Name":"Kris House","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJa4DGqeCeOnrGLk9bIMGn8PwWlPGMXIalbVP53kHpGPIHjkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Who knew you'd be able to find quaint, classic and unbelievably crafted french cuisine in a small restaurant on the side of the road off of Glen Lake?  We took our teens children (who are very open to trying new things) and they loved their meals. Not a place where there'd be many kids esp at that price point, but it wasn't odd and the staff were wonderful!  Escargot and tomato tart appetizers were tasty. All entrees were perfection. Desserts were interesting, esp the chocolate cake in phyllo. Overall, a fantastic experience. Food speaks for itself!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOujRRvj5YFVYbRDbggyLnmxpVaBZc4qyL78NVP&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2019-8-25"},{"Name":"David Kastner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjbNy_ScsviPxU4ZhlNbp1YZ4XGtJiDXJqWeAxOwhU7vFOAhCAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Phenomenal food from start to finish. Every course was incredibly fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented.
Highlights: mussels, charcuterie, shrimp creole, and warm chocolate cake. All of these dishes were fantastic.
The standouts: onion soup (WOW), and duck duo. Do not pass these up.

My only suggestion would be for the kitchen to communicate and educate the staff about the finer details of the dishes so as not to guess or generalize too much when asked. Build their confidence in the knowledge of the food and help them sell it easier to potentially hesitant customers.

Overall a wonderful dining experience. HIGHLY recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM8LK9TDDwB8FQC1FyNpDikHOa-zbJ9EmDYo0FZ&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2021-6-20"},{"Name":"Alex Walsh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw8lUnlbD8zNDVtTSOf2Jprb3aXMxVu6mr9lV36NAUZ7jM8HDR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Before coming here, I've only ever had French food in France. La Becasse was an amazing experience. The food and atmosphere made me reminisce of my time in Giverny. The waitstaff was also great. Anyone looking for a French experience in Northwestern Michigan needs to pay La Becasse a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOxDdZCL_vKoZsFZfIDlUpa9QGeW8vcjtrVyus_&fid=0x0:0x43dd7d03f31ae220"],"When":"2020-6-21"},{"Name":"J. Donald Sheets","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4c3LbZGa357GQPCbokMHZceOyeond3vPuvFJcRG62_ni9JYL8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been coming here for decades. Still exceptional and a great experience. Celebrated my 64th birthday with a fine meal and a brilliant staff. Thanks Michelle!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aria M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjt406ZiVseKtBwu4PamIJ-PprCH7MKzJRM_kqASJK-scG0cle=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had burgers here in August & they tasted great & were perfectly cooked. There are no words to use to describe how delicious that peppercorn bacon app is!!  Just get it!! Service was great.

Came last week for brunch. Started with that Peppercorn Bacon <3  Had the Monte Cristo w/ potatoes & the Cheddar Strata. Both were amazing & HUGE portions. The potatoes were crispy perfection. Mimosas were very good.

Both times I visited I was there right when they opened so I had no issues with wait times. I had been forewarned by others that the place fills up quickly. They do take reservations now up to 4 weeks in advance so that's a plus.

I will say our brunch server was not bad, he just acted like he wanted us to leave within 45 minutes - (place was not full so it wan't like they needed the table) It was a weird vibe. We ordered an app, we ordered main dishes, we each had 2 drinks. But he kept wanting to box up our food & finally just brought boxes & set them on the table. We told him we didn't need anything else just yet but that we were going to order another drink when we finished the ones we had. (they were still half full)  He walked away then came right back & put the bill on the table..........Then stood & stared at us from about 2 feet away. So, we hurried up & finished our drinks & I paid the bill. I left him a $20 tip on an $80 check & we left & went to Blue Dog Tavern for that other drink.

Not taking any stars off but owners/managers should address that with staff (or post you have to eat & leave within a certain timeframe) Lucy's has that on their website that you only get 90 minutes for brunch & that is why we did not go there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPKBe_vMOEL-Oosw_BJFJ4c3VFpzrcsM-3LBRK4&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-11-18"},{"Name":"Cam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgOVNy8vVWXaJ_njjY5fqJUbt2X5gMRz52MpsoSldr2AVaGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite restaurant in town without a doubt. The vibe is impeccable, the food is delicious, and the drinks are absolutely scintillating. If you are thinking about going here just do it. Reserve a table early though, they fill up!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPCuhPeLwyI27Ew3yU-Fx2wptJjUKiXnFTSNUV8&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-11-12"},{"Name":"The Cow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4JLlxbkpvLHE240zuOlK-30Dby0Ag3MRN55d5d5zbOCc__-Z6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were lucky enough to be sat with Kelsey today. She is the picture of a perfect waitress and took great care of us. My wagyu sirloin was one of the best steaks I've ever had too. It was tender, cooked perfectly, and had great sides. I'll remember this wine and dine for a long time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPnjSgcDsFl59ugpS5RWucbSUAFfEegOyZOjFF5&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-11-10"},{"Name":"Samy Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVY2-2q135o741DIBvzYNqahDEH5--lrrJ7uQZw3GDMH_lePWqd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely incredible restaurant. Ambience and decor felt very upscale and vintage at the same time. Gorgeous outdoor patio spaces. Cocktails were incredible and my wagu steak was amazing!! I don’t know how they made the potatoes that came with the dish but i still dream about them. Highly recommend for a great date night or special occasion! Make sure you leave room for dessert though. Especially the apple crisp!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOXUqE6m2ExiBJH-EdaMMPYHpXJYEQrp9TRf4j5&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-5-25"},{"Name":"Jina Patton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZsjb1DhyMXSzLpzCjrLASn-G4aRv789v-8R4PakTLx-zeMYMIyg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an absolute delight. Let's get started.

Our starter was the whipped feta, it was very tasty with a soft pillowy bread that complimented the feta perfectly. They will bring you more bread if asked, and you'll probably ask.

Now to the entrees, and this is where we thought we already had it good, we were not prepared.

Ricotta Agnolotti, a creamy decadent comfort food with just a little hint of spice right at the end of the bite. The guanciale complimented every part of the dish, it was amazing!

But then...

Butcher's Cut
7oz. Wagyu Gold NY Strip from Snake River Farms
Truffle butter, bearnaise, chives. Medium rare.

Per the amazing wait person Tim, this is an A4 level Wagyu piece and it served up to be everything I had hoped for and more. The sear was perfect, the flavor kept walking with the bite. As the outside fed into the soft and delicate center of the cut the flavor was astounding. Tim had suggested a Squirming Coil as a perfect compliment to this dish and it did not disappoint.

As we were both quite full, they were kind enough to send a small Chocolate Pot De Creme out as we were celebrating a birthday. This desert was decadent in every way even so much as I am not a sweets person I could actually crave that.

The only reason this was not a 5 star all the way round was the atmosphere, being new to the area and this my first visit I was unaware that a booth meant in the bar area with music being above what I prefer for conversation.

All in all, we will be coming back here again and again, the service was impeccable the food was divine. Thank you Butcher's Union for a wonderful celebration.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNUy_fkM5KPAi29AsfGMqrTgGFcokuwPaNSv5K9&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-9-19"},{"Name":"Omar Flores","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHg3S4VqcRpA-8iKa7gaY7_PWEP_IVvAwHelQjba1yNhTzbPFm5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I really liked it. I thought the food was good. the drinks and the drink menu were above board, and the food choices and quality were great. We liked the atmosphere quite a bit and the service was terrific. I'd go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN9hLKnsLRHHplKOPvCz446zdOBv5mVmoNKyZZ4&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-11-24"},{"Name":"Stacy Roelofs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfHSwaySfhJO4Zp-6799lAi-MyWeiyrWnKqiYAnoK1T1zjm0d1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We arrived around 4:30 on Friday afternoon and got sat right away. We had a great time! The drinks were delicious and the food was stellar! Our service was also top notch.
10/10 would definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPcH7RoCFLLN1lEPSX7xSoG4e0pnzWxiA6h8fJt&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-4-21"},{"Name":"Nathaniel Kuiper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCZsusU8rDPxVxBdEeyGeU56odWlT0ueTtLJUcxpgwvRsnPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark served us, fantastic service. I had the Paloma, the wife had another cocktail - both 10/10. New York strip was great, had Brussels and salmon ceviche for apps. Ceviche was good if you’re feeling adventurous, Brussels are a great and safe choice.

Atmosphere is the only complaint- some tables better than others. Walk in and you’ll see what I mean. High top for drinks and apps, booth to truly dine in with multiple course meal. Highly recommend this restaurant and mark as your server.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPuUM3y-HzTcfcIapVtMBj_dyAIwJY6QLVU9w7j&fid=0x0:0x931d4981cd723735"],"When":"2024-9-22"}]

They were both amazing. Fish was light and crunchy. Ribs were so tender! Sauce was sweet. Also got the lobster lettuce wraps which were spicy. Peanut sauce was a nice touch but they were really good. Food was great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN04q9fx0ka6QZDbKj4ys4xlNNX876gxcTf2fDr&fid=0x0:0xc53847d09a398e3c"],"When":"2024-6-27"},{"Name":"Lauren Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyP7TR4VRYYImdu0mDYGQ96SehhwzXhmvZjNnJCEM4qBDv_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Planks was a beautiful place to have an early dinner before headed back home to Indy! Service was fast and the food was incredible. I seriously don’t think I’ve ever had a steak that good before! Such a great experience, and I will definitely go back when I come back up to St Joseph!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMr_c0KJ1ElDAR8wvzE34SoLfp6xx5uWqfVVQ75&fid=0x0:0xc53847d09a398e3c"],"When":"2024-9-18"},{"Name":"Katherine R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMn_NjgI2BuZZYQ1TGhM8jQS2HGCxzCCLEQKsQs2wGGGZIuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Always lovely. Nicely decorated for the holidays 🎄 a little pricey but not exorbitant. Fish is cooked well every time. Best for couples or small groups. It's not a kids restaurant. It's a little snig but not overly crowded. The atmosphere feel lively without being too noisy. There is a well attended bar in the middle of the restaurant. Make a reservation!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacquelyn Brooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdsCLiLQGdJfWa_64ZqE7cLyLks4ufZ62XyyfJoemXbc1qiA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to Michigan for a family reunion and decided to take a quick drive to see Lake Michigan. I wanted dinner at a restaurant with a view, so I Googled and found Planks. At my first glance,  the menu didn't seem to "Wow" me.  But, honey let me tell you,  the food did WOW me!

We ordered the bread with butter candle. Which was actually a candle made out of butter with a wick! Once lit, it melted the butter so we could dip our bread.

We also ordered the kale salad and the brussel sprouts. Both were delicious 😋.

My husband ordered a vegetarian pasta, with a cheese Alfredo sauce.  This pasta was exceptional and ranks in his top 5. I ordered the sliders which were also delicious.

Overall,  I had an outstanding meal at Plank's. I would highly recommend this restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP8fpK8XcpzCTxDtuFBrJrIEdOCv7enlRvAEKa9&fid=0x0:0xc53847d09a398e3c"],"When":"2023-7-15"},{"Name":"Jennifer Horenziak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGnqNo-X5ah7FPj84lXGLQiUcyfEfdmi1zDLYE8xmSwNRM0V4O=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was very good. We had reservations for 11 on a Sunday and arrived around 10:30 and didn't have to wait. We ordered promptly and didn't have to wait long for the order to come out. I had the chicken and biscuits, with an over easy egg. My husband had the hash and eggs which he enjoyed as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPQjWD1VtHWLClkgriyK7UkFnjAaJDL8y6zeIhr&fid=0x0:0xc53847d09a398e3c"],"When":"2023-4-21"},{"Name":"Sherri Lackey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSkO2S6lntso-KqSTTapN4iRNbwS3_lATpidz1efxCS5F45XYP3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Plank's has an upscale feel but prices for the working man's budget! Quality food, atmosphere, and service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM3FOWSbGTiBrgsoH_GbFzDnaV-x0-YRYFROOO9&fid=0x0:0xc53847d09a398e3c"],"When":"2024-5-26"},{"Name":"jason Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJg2FUJYAIAZ7_8ymba7qKLQag8MPelwbWlMI4S6JXMfsoCpg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Wait for 40 minutes for 2 breakfast that came lukewarm has browns burnt server stopped to check on us 1 time in the 40 minutes to be told two more minutes which was actually 10 more minutes. Over all not a  pleasant experience. I love the atmosphere tho.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erinn Proehl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOf8ue2rYdt80N_37675ZGXpoZtI9gh1hxqQuw5TgEkbTzVA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great time meeting for Mother’s Day and a Birthday. Everything is excellent. It’s nice to see the water.. a little strange to see the big gravel yard, but we still enjoyed it.
Our server was top-notch.. helped us remember our to-go box and our cell phone!
If you are there with a group, get the pretzel.
Surf & Turf special was delicious as were the Ribs.
We would come back in a heartbeat.. not sure why this has 4.3 stars instead of 4.7… it’s good!
We we’re celebrating a lot, so maybe it’s the prices… but it sure seemed worth it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNSoYojyrhhGzrKbYH-UFKvSWvuaZ0G4KfqtYgJ&fid=0x0:0xc53847d09a398e3c"],"When":"2022-5-5"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Todd Powers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW04xCW8ao8IJ62SwgCN3zReIUi08fND4HjF6mGnGeO5bjfcimSvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"♿ Great food, great atmosphere, and great weather, made for a very enjoyable dinner.

The glazed Salmon w/Mango Salsa was great! So good, I forgot to take a picture. 🤤

We walked in at ~6:30pm on a Tuesday and there were plenty of tables indoors. The weather was nice, so we decided to wait, the quoted ~20min, for an outdoor table. There were plenty of tables open in the sand, but we needed to wait for a table I could get to in my PowerChair.

We went up to the outside bar, ordered a couple drinks, and waited for our table. It was probably ~15 minutes, so the estimate the hostess gave us, was accurate.

We sat and enjoyed our meal, as the sun went down, exposing the storm that was rolling across Lake Michigan. By the time we left, we were treated to a lightning show. 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO5DAXWfiGVBKqJE4TJKVroiNPLQ5gu3BOuut31&fid=0x0:0xc1c335e240ae1d2c"],"When":"2024-8-29"},{"Name":"Topcatjack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6_-11ywVjX7ao9EJWE2HGX2XvCwrjawSEWbDO0GUi3UzvA7d_Hw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Our server was very nice.  My wife ordered iced tea and she brewed a new batch fresh for ger.  The place is clean and has a very nice atmosphere.  The food was on the high and low ends of the scale.  We ordered the calamari and it was not bad for not being oceanside.  The chowder was good but arrived at the table cold.  Our server noticed that it was cold as she served it to my wife and promptly took it back zapping it in the microwave (you should never microwave seafood) but, it was still tasty.  I had the steak sandwich and it was very good.  Sloppy, but delicious.  The house parm chips that came with the salad were not good.  They were chewy not crisp at all with no flavor.  My wife also ordered the capris salad.  She was not impressed and didn't eat much of it.  The tomatoes were soft and not fresh. The mozzarella was dry.  It could have used more vinaigrette also.  The place is on the pricey side and unfortunately, I cannot say it was worth the money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPKFZM-IMOuDQrgKc_44XXRx9pcH0nQY8vg5pky&fid=0x0:0xc1c335e240ae1d2c"],"When":"2024-8-18"},{"Name":"Julie Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrJiIS7G6uKbXAYUfdw_wonmFE-qKPkO0PK9O2oWkKbAVmvrDt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place is absolutely amazing! The view is to die for. And the staff are all kind. The head chef is friendly, and the bartenders are so sweet. There's plenty of seating and a bar you can sit at. There's a huge free parking lot. And there's a really cool outdoor patio with warming fires. I only had a drink here but I know the chef so I know the food's going to be amazing. I will update my review when I go eat there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael A. Spielmaker (SPIEL)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkTjtBG6YK43v-04sg28O4uRytRHw2McRuAGOP-3oXP2APAq49MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were there for Mothers Day brunch on Sunday, and it was awesome. With a great atmosphere, food, and service, we were greeted and seated immediately with a smile. Our waitress was polite, knowledgeable of all menue meals and desserts. The meals were of large portions and cooked to perfection. Thank you, Noto's, for an outstanding meal and service. 🫡🇺🇲","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPJexYYnJ6f4e1b-I6u3LhYKXtfs69XhLQxev5g&fid=0x0:0xc1c335e240ae1d2c"],"When":"2024-5-14"},{"Name":"Brad Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIO2q3wRVyjbV0Fy2PlAmJ69NKIqzbRC5iktVZKIwrYBKHmZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been going to Noto's since it has opened and had some amazing meals there. Were not sure what happen if there was a change in management of chefs but we were there twice in the last three weeks and once was tonight and I don't think we will be coming back any time soon. We ordered the Lake Perch which was a far cry from Lake Perch and by the time you removed all the breading there was a little sliver of fish. The waitress we had was one of the worst we've had in a long time. We would have received a better dinner @ Long John Slivers. To many places to go to was waste time and money going here","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Calvin And Kristen Wilkinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUP35YeFaWilIyl6V7xwbvII13JVI2MYGiwyxjmwlKgc4dfQ2L_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My husband and I had dinner and drinks here a couple of days ago (Sunday) for the first time. We sat at the bar (like always). The view is incredible! The service and food were great, as were the drinks! Parking is a bit tricky and filled up quickly. That said, it's the week before Coast Guard Festival and the  weather was perfect, so that is to be expected. Joseph, our bartender was amazing! He is very honest and does his absolute best to match a drink with you. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMBwzMwrRz388-K6EuzIkQDmSUQ6LaylyKrwGE8&fid=0x0:0xc1c335e240ae1d2c"],"When":"2021-7-27"},{"Name":"Zakiah Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNUFaX47JBMi_M3AO2Z_ufcOuCeYNgO_Sa9zhKhjYm8v0t2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Manager is deplorable, she is rude to customers and staff.  She doesn’t seem to have a handle of the place.  Our server was nice and did a decent job.

As for food, the spaghetti was dry and lacking flavor.  The crab app, was ok but not great.  The pizza was the only thing that tasted good.

As for the location and views, it’s great.  Wish the rest of the experience could meet the view but fell flat and will not return.  Too many other places to spend money to get better service and food.  Super sad because it could be a great place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhaTrsz3dSoqo97op2lEkmuwNx6F2FYPIg0dyGsAihVippjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The views is stunning the service and the atmosphere is great. Dog friendly is a big plus. Sunsets incredible. Now for the food. We ordered the truffle pizza but it had way too much oil on it it was drowning in oil, dough and cheese was very tasty but too much oil. we also had the beef tenderloin papardelle which was good but not worth the $36 price tag. We will be back to try a different kind of pizza because I believe in second chances , and for a drink and for the incredible view and ambience .","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Emily Fletcher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFAmGzXFXCLUYj5V19LrnzRE15UxjpbZGRu-iLyg_AYPecFV_v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a last-second addition to our trip to TC and it ended up being our favorite restaurant we visited! We've been to Michelin star restaurants before and the food at Wren was on par with those meals. Their menu doesn't list a vegetarian option, but they do accommodate vegetarians by creating a unique off-menu dish of their seasonal vegetables. Our vegetarian loved her meal! Could not recommend Wren highly enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPmIjj_SisIlSPomh9Jk-LoxCZThU0302hMXVta&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2024-9-15"},{"Name":"Bradley Maze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLweRi2fSG8KPtIp3EqvFfB9OtxRBE4eGIrSr6AfNRHZjnhUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a spectacular culinary experience! Strongly recommend the tasting menu paired with wines. A great memory!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPqIeXSBR6ycCTTl7LkTT66j9MvsZbuW-tJXbf9&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Rebecca Meyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBevh5D3BRTLOMXVvfX2sycIUSE3Avn7PqhggXo4zVz2bYog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The service was outstanding and the wine exceptional.  Disappointed In the serving size and presentation of the of the white fish.  The food was off to the side of the plate with accompaniments and half the plate was bare.  Understand the small portions, but fish should be a little heartier.  And we celebrated a birthday and the birthday guest was presented with a candle in a jar of coffee beans.  Just weird.  A small chocolate would have been a much nicer acknowledgment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cassandra Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGA89tjIGROem-gKwzfyBqD1gnYWH7q43U5YO7J8nEEyu3IqGhvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On a recent trip to the Leelanau Peninsula, my husband and I dined at Wren for the first time and were very impressed. This small, cozy restaurant has so much charm, from the historic building to the warm and friendly staff, we were made to feel right at home.

Everything on the menu appealed to us, which made it very difficult to decide what to order. When we return, we will definitely try the tasting menu. We were very pleased with each course, but felt dessert came up a bit short. Our favorites included the octopus, beets and whitefish.

Service at Wren was top-notch. Our server was helpful, prompt and friendly.

Overall, we were so pleased to find a special restaurant to fill the hole that formed when Alliance closed several years ago. If you are in the Traverse City vicinity, the short drive up to Sutton's Bay will take you to one of the best dining experiences in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMF8SOKj4aQPT_AqKO0dazIZYkYqaWQyJReBw0p&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2022-11-12"},{"Name":"Tony Norton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW75EoMTD0mZonQVWcOyKLpqDhowk-iND7Q9k-gM-Q5c_lnWVRlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We booked a reservation 1 month out for our dinner last night for 8:00PM. We arrived at 7:45 and checked in. The restaurant didn't have a dedicated host but rather the servers were rotating the role when reservations came in. This waitress told us that our table wasn't available yet and we should "come back at 8:00." We thought that was a little odd that we weren't invited to have a drink at the bar, etc. Maybe that was implied but it seemed odd that they didn't state that/welcome us.

After waiting outside on a bench, we came in and our table was still not available. We were told that "our" table was being used by the chef's family. They had been there since 5:30, 2 and half hours. One would think the chef's family would understand the need of the restaurant to satisfy their PAYING customers and kindly get up when the other reservations arrived as scheduled. After waiting until 8:11 we were sat at a table and we were told that we will need to 'move once "our" table was ready.' This is not the customers problem. When customers go out to a restaurant, they expect to be seated once, in the timeframe of their reservation. Neither of these expectations were met. We waited 14 minutes from the time we ordered our drinks until they arrived at the table. The drinks were delicious, kudos to the bartender (who seemed to be the only competent FOH person in the restaurant). "Our" table was available 25 minutes after our reservation time. We sat down, again, and ordered immediately.

We had ordered a la carte but I had asked the waitress if we could have our items one at a time, she obliged. When we had questions about the branzino (fish) the waitress said "Yep, it comes with everything, the bones, the tail and the eyes looking up at you." I am not paraphrasing, that is EXACTLY what she said. Would you order that if it was described to you in this way?!

The food was for the most part exquisite and delicately prepared. We got the beets, caesar salad, deviled eggs, cheese board as appetizers. I ordered the ducks and my GF ordered the steak cut medium. Out favorite appetizer was the beets with the carrot puree and raspberries. Pacing was going fine until we were waiting for the cheese board. We waited 20 minutes for it to arrive. We had started to become full once the cheese board arrived so we didn't eat it all. We asked for it to be boxed. Once it was boxed, we waited another 15-20 minutes for our entrees to arrive.

My duck was overdone (our friend who happened to also be eating there next to us and ordered the duck specifically told me to order it MR because his was also overdone.) However, I love duck so it didn't concern me all that much. But when you're paying over $40 a plate I'm sure you could understand that this is not an unreasonable request to have it prepared correctly, and timely for that matter. When the server came back to check on our entrees, my girlfriend mentioned that her steak was underdone (MR when ordered MED; See picture below) and the server more or less shrugged it off; Didn't apologize, didn't ask to fix it, didn't offer / bring a small free dessert / comp our first round of drinks, etc. The staff seemed nonchalant about the entire dining experience.

Once the check was dropped off we ask for our first round of drinks to be comped because of our poor experience throughout the entire evening from start to finish.

We returned to the restaurant after visiting for the first time last year for our anniversary, however the magic was not there for this visit. Unfortunately, we did not have the experience we were expecting for a restaurant who prides itself in the fine dining experience.

TL;DR the food was excellent but the service was poor. We spent $200 for a 2 and half hour dinner for poorly prepared entrees (specifically) with a staff ill equipped for the fine dining experience.

Next time we'll choose a restaurant that values our time and money elsewhere for better service and tastier food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOXR-XymHhkO94G2BtPpgoUmIglTBy_FhWTjm4d&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2023-7-26"},{"Name":"Julianne Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSKspiZFE7GONrm738Gp9twBoU93SKLcveom2fvtPMllKhJJtH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nestled in the charm of an old firehouse, it offers an intimate environment that feels both cozy and refined. From the moment we walked in, the service was warm and welcoming, setting the perfect tone.

The cocktails were fabulous, but the Bonded Pear stole the show—a perfect fall cocktail with layers of flavor that made us wish we’d ordered several rounds!

The food was nothing short of inventive and scrumptious. The highlight? The roasted white pumpkin soup, which was unlike anything I’ve ever tasted. From the first spoonful, I was floored—it was rich, velvety, and packed with surprising flavors that made it impossible to put down.

Every detail, from the service to the drinks and food, was impeccable. I can’t wait to come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNytHPqfq3bYOMXwrSGZw1C6pY2ECXyuDp_pcu8&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2024-10-14"},{"Name":"Kristel Coronado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4aBYu1xcC8RjQaD_uvrdEbymfG8T1d06s9yN2xFf9mwBnz1b2sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delish!! Made our reservation a few days before heading up north and were easily accommodated. This food was so yummy, the drinks are fantastic, and the service was friendly and attentive. We ended up each getting the pre-course with wine pairing. Each dish was so tasty... Highly recommend and can't wait to go back and try different menu items! 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNAyYszNXGVPpvaB97wlKt9GPrEAtaXrvtITycy&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2020-8-9"},{"Name":"doug campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlAq4Dmhl7so4id9tff52Tukhncx26OkuCFJ2UcyVUiR5DNJU1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down one of the best restaurants in Northern Michigan. Every time we've gone in for dinner, we have been blown away. Exceptional cocktails and selection of wine. Have not ordered a dish we didn't love. One of our go to restaurants, because we know we will leave satisfied.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPvuvx7k3QRuIrESX_nmA4Zv2Pye5EhICKByiWo&fid=0x0:0xc687777f8cdd6bf6"],"When":"2023-9-16"}]
