user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Zachary Frieben","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3if-nFVChlqiRK0XDElL7BGvspiREM35K74Du9_h6M40TsVNX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here with my Dad. It wouldn't been my Mom and Dad's 31st anniversary of she was still around, so we did this to honor her. The interior is Zazio-esque, which is not a bad thing as it's a nice interior. The service was good, our waitress was very good with her recommendations and made sure we had what we needed.

We started off with a Caesar salad. That was amazing, I think it's literally the best Caesar salad I've ever had! So well proportioned And everything was fresh and delicious!

Our entree was the seafood boil. It wasn't the best seafood I've ever had, but still good, I think I'd get something else next time. And finally, dessert: Bread pudding! That was a delicious bread pudding, yum! I would definitely return and try something else 👍🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO397i6d8TFmrrwWt56GI1sUDu7JdVeM8VbTKU&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-11-13"},{"Name":"Yaya Quintero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFFfI_Bua5cP3bYFA5O9aiBF1CFaq3yav2ZaDkQUcnfcTVwUL6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I came here last minute to celebrate our anniversary and we had such an amazing time! Our server Jordan was phenomenal. Our table had rose pedals and a menu with all the staff names congratulating us on our 1 year. The food was so good and cooked to perfection! Definitely an amazing experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNosJPO-y7-blYzmNobxBJbBkcStVom8TiW19kO&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-9-29"},{"Name":"John Sams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTbW6uolsjo4z1arCQlwbpu8nBelxIYGCrLLSrfKedjvROBmWT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some of the best food I have ever eaten. From the moment you walked in at the front. Each person knew their jobs and knew them well. I had the roasted duck, and my wife had the pork chop, we also got a side of Brussel sprouts , and potatoes, for dessert we had the S’mores Chocolate Budino. But most of all our waitress Hannah went above and beyond to make the experience one of the best dining experiences ever! Thank you Brick and Brine! It takes a lot to impress me when it comes to food. You all hit a home run!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM9lvuUzqmQpsk19gFBB7x6JKsY_fGiFUqhXJRb&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-8-10"},{"Name":"Alayna Pletcher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVRulAy37oI-Kj3LKd1eEsoZ9dZryOf4XqnxyrICPrsHpsddHUwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience over all! We were celebrating our anniversary and they went above and beyond. We arrived and had custom happy 2nd anniversary menus, rose petals on our table and the hostess took a Polaroid photo of us. We ordered the meatball appetizer and lobster bisque to start, both incredible. I had the lamb ragu and my husband had the fried chicken - he claimed it was the best chicken he’d ever had. Our waitress was very kind and helpful. They brought us chocolate covered strawberries before we left. We are excited to go back soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM3FZ4Nrh9vFH6ePT6Zm2joxVjGxBxBKxqr9sGJ&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-7-9"},{"Name":"Brooks Weber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9RlJYV5xfG1ss1LkAdqfadk5aKAXqnBAaAT1ORIALQTZEp_cR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time visit on a surprise date night with my daughters. They both have a steak/seafood and hotel mgmt background and this is their favorite place. The decor is very stylish but also casual. They also have a great wine list and chefs table. I had an Argentinian Malbec blend that was very robust. The salmon tartare appetizer was one of the lightest, most delicious things to ever touch my taste-buds. We shared the Lamb Ragu and Duck Confit, as well as their wedge salad. And we shared a bisque that was as much a delicate, delicious puff pastry. The service was EXCELLENT, with every person we met being very welcoming and attentive. Our guide for the experience was Brick n’ Brine rockstar Kenzie. Many thanks to her, her fellow servers, staff and their GM for making our night so special. Located in and attached to the Radisson hotel, this is absolutely the best dining experience in Kalamazoo/West Mi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO9NWjP95aCOzzuWHDIMhikyFYe9jXUwWyE31D_&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-4-6"},{"Name":"John Geha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6GcoB53PCuUOs256zz7mwMosy09ZBuiaXL0Z4ODX2xSrebQObmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous, one of the finest restaurants in North America!!! Wow, incredible service and knowledge of the menu, wines, bourbon, and scotch. I had one of the best corn chowder soups anywhere in North America. My salad was excellent... but my main course is a custom dish with a pesto pasta with shrimp and lobster ravioli with a tagliatelle pasta...WOW!!! The beauty of Michigan, along with some of the finest restaurants in North America!! Great wine selection, great bourbon, and scotch selection! It's just an overall wonderful dining experience! A huge call to Steve & Rae behind the bar...knowledge, hell yes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMrOG5N5109lCQamfBYl1c8fDaU0Fc7HfqV0bhu&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2023-10-3"},{"Name":"Courtney Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYHBXYuYq6cpsvdkuHxSHbXTf42DrV9xghmEi5JFN0lvfq5F0i3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great place for a nice dinner.  Loved the atmosphere and a very friendly staff.  The food was delicious from a starter to the meals to dessert.  Drinks were great too. It was on the pricey side, but well worth it in my opinion.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM3UN44-tLyU0ae9yEq1FBz7gqGR_SCwpPoFxc8&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-3-26"},{"Name":"Michelle Sprygada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpFc4qHOQoV_lSYz54UztJKnfSBfgvjijo291HxXkQ3B4T=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came for our 25th anniversary and were not disappointed!  We had a wonderful table and were well taken care of by our waiter Nick and his trainee.  Seated in a semi-private booth back towards the private rooms and it was a great quiet space and good for observing everything happening in the restaurant.  Food & drinks were top notch, you must try the pistachio cake on the spring menu if they have it when you're there!  We were not rushed or pestered but were able to enjoy each others company and each course or beverage in it's due time.  Thank you for such a memorable night out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMz1eq9c6pVDrJHqgdz10qRLPvKPdX9hv3hNVE&fid=0x0:0x8d0d989204f6d8a7"],"When":"2024-5-10"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Detroit Al","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrNwY1851FO18erFTY2IvWMxI4W1eOumSR5A4017UQtBc5e011=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pasta e Fagioli, Shrimp Risotto  & Lasagna were absolutely incredible.

I've been going someplace else for 40 years and missing out on the best Italian food in the area.  I thought I was eating good, but didn't know any better...until now.  My server Chris was absolutely right about the food at Giovanni's.

PS.......You Must Get The Key Lime Cheesecake; Absolutely Perfect 👌.

If you want the best...come here.

Oh Yeah - The leftovers the next day were like eating in the restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOA7LgJFLxDYTvcVFwhs3TUrHifCJ9AguQLA5J7&fid=0x0:0xe258e5115285ada1"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Debbie Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6qG7BkQnMJV7RsonOSUCRy5dMyijc2_6BEDfksWOY2yetrj9Rtg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience at this enchanting venue. Initially, I felt apprehensive driving to the location due to safety concerns. However, upon entering, the atmosphere transformed into a magical setting. The exceptional cuisine further elevated the experience.

As I was attending a business gathering as a guest, I refrained from taking pictures to maintain a respectful demeanor. Overall, I'm delighted to have had this opportunity, and I look forward to returning in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Craig Richardville","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWM9W00TfnuNhkrsmJy596n9xlldZIaW1gTGtIkK7w0OOZFBWcK-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"#1 Italian Restaurant !!!
You'll need to make reservations and it's easy to understand why!  Once you go, you'll want to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNUj8KHnpudj1rO7MfxUAHEihTxygDU-Ac4Jk0b&fid=0x0:0xe258e5115285ada1"],"When":"2024-12-29"},{"Name":"NARENDRA ACHANTA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9u-tfQbHJei3CDWxS0WZhyvWCJ99L1tL4478Ot7ID5PwhufZzYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best Italian food I’ve had in a while! Serving is great and super friendly. Food kept topping one over the other. Make sure to have space for their delicious dessert. Food is Cooked to perfection , 100% recommend to make a reservation as they are super packed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMqNp74yIIQDsUoAO9vZ6ysEXQ4s2PncVQMUjKq&fid=0x0:0xe258e5115285ada1"],"When":"2024-3-10"},{"Name":"Dan Tocco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLl-M-nq2uSecCSLUv2JZJ9_m4ptm9QajWFOXD5qGtjSrDlWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What happened here? We’ve been going for the past twenty years and this week was the worst. Food still OK, but service is beyond terrible. We were informed that two servers would be waiting on us, meaning no one is waiting on us. Starting at the front desk, no one here knows what is going on. Pace of the drinks and dinner was off. This used to be one of the best, now one of the worst.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephen Kappeler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQudQKw8IECZWpm_vNXLo1ECSYUAdvqIJh6tQiI6TpgflFBoHwQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Godfather room is the way to go for a semi private special setting. We hosted our 84 year old great grandfather and two new babies celebration. They flooded us with steps of service like their own family. We will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNjjp2xcTocKm8UwX_FxlLf5eHVA8eXITFJoADW&fid=0x0:0xe258e5115285ada1"],"When":"2023-10-27"},{"Name":"Amy Krauss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2TjpoTYwD3qD2RacCcLGNtQrFr5IipfdODAJO7emd7_J_4SI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service and food is always top notch. I recommend EVERYTHING but if you want to get something for the table to try, even if it's just one bite, get the lasagna. The homemade noodles are paper thin. I didn't think lasagna could feel light until I had it there. (In fact, we've ordered it takeout for the past 10 Thanksgivings. You buy it frozen and cook it at home.)
The chicken piccata and arancini are delicious as well. You can't go wrong with their cocktails either. This restaurant is a true unexpected gem in an industrial neighborhood .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlene Kobetis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO6vY5Sf6w8mrtotRJA5DiC-KlwrRZ5JhY69MgK3g6m_hGu7aD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Our waiter was just so so. We had to ask for bread twice, he forgot my niece’s dessert and never got back to my sister about purchasing some of their house salad dressing. When my sister asked for a fork, he moved her plate like he didn’t believe her.   My nephew was paying the bill but he gave the folder to his wife????","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"William Wichert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI10DgUyTkgdpPlpB27YAlgNIdKKqXcWiCFBM_2441lvgP2dQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Quality seems to have dropped off a little over the years. Sides and drinks were great this trip, but some of the protein was sub par. Some cold and tough, others incredibly fatty and poorly trimmed. Hope this is just a one off because I love coming here when in the area","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Reinhout","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVapun770Jq1VmZoACeMvrfnXPcXDgk-bUhfPW3_N03o1AYnkoXAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"So been going here for a few years and normally dine in with no issues. However getting take out is a different story. Got home after ordering take out to see I did not receive everything I ordered.  I called up and the girl asked if I called the restaurant or used an app to order.  I told her I called the restaurant.  She replied I'm sorry but we do not do refunds. I did not even ask for a refund.  I replied,  if you guys screw up an order you don't do anything about it? She replied not typically but I can get you a manager.  I explained to the manager what was going on and she said the same thing as the girl before about no refunds. At this time I told her I am not even asking for a refund I just want what I am missing or a credit for the next time I am there. She replied we normally don't do that but let me call my boss. After a few minutes on hold the manager told me that they can give me a $5 gift card. I explained that does not cover anything I am missing not even a side let alone the dinner. She said I know but $5 is all we are allowed to do. Terrible customer service,  even the manager agreed with me on how Terrible this is but continued to say that they are not allowed to do anything more then a $5 gift card. Very disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqc4Js_hbpSJyGd7HxE4_GSDRsIjYI5FHNMKdapkO7Vpm1mm0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fun place to hangout with the family on a Friday evening. The young ones love the pinball machines upstairs while waiting for the food. The adults likes the bar and its drinks choices.

The food was very good, for my uneducated taste bud it’s as good as most BBQ places down in Texas. Our waitress was super friendly and attentive, a perfect combination.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOo-M3t_U37axnq98px5dpiozYA7M3ZFYgjV-b5&fid=0x0:0xfcc7d9618f4116b1"],"When":"2024-11-4"},{"Name":"Jeff Rauh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEq0fnBTCro3shzpTtUDzmzJmKGngYfWd_yZTCrtA8cqOWsyu9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The famous (locally) woodshop.  An all around good restaurant. The Mac & Cheese is well known, but other less known good dishes are the smoked chicken and wood sticks.  They also have many great craft cocktails.  The only downside is the higher price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPBtZHdyYDDGbtVxS3uviJKEqpIADZQpMDxyI6y&fid=0x0:0xfcc7d9618f4116b1"],"When":"2024-4-1"},{"Name":"Sport Mom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpaCsemw4Hg_syxyEQ3zT74CeHc1vETb3BO3OLVY5La4HqI7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came in on a Thursday night. Our party of 3 got right in and our sever, Jay came right over. He was friendly and engaging and very familiar with the menu. We ordered the pulled pork, brisket and the sweet potato burrito. Max b cheese and tater tots were our sides of choice. The food came out just as we ordered. Hott fresh and tasty. If bbq is your thing, you’ll find a variety of sauces on the table. All in all a good experience! Will definitely come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMuZXhZIUTgsayJZ1oqEPoP47pUkGT8l4xZIv0T&fid=0x0:0xfcc7d9618f4116b1"],"When":"2023-7-28"},{"Name":"Roberta Peek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIep_LtnayDd5lmjXZRqsc_yx1iM6F_-HRIsS1uShU-OPjamA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"There was some type of pub crawl going on the night we went. Though, with that, the wait wasn't terribly long. We waited upstairs in the comfy chairs in the corner. Some fun spooky decorations were up there for Halloween. Great vibe.  We were texted that the table was ready so walked down to our table. We shared the Loaded Potato Pizza that was surprisingly good. Then, the Pork Belly Burnt Ends which were the best around and the yummy Baby Back Ribs. Note: They don't bring all the sauces out to the table unless you ask because some are refrigerated. Make sure to ask for those cause they are yummy. Try them all, you may be surprised which ones you'll like. Though I didn't try the super spicy one. I am pretty sure it wouldn't like me. The rest perfect. So after the amazing meal, took home some Butterscotch Pudding which was very tasty. If you are in the area this is the place to stop.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNndZtwTe8zJsquO7_zZVspQ91Yt1OMPeYre1qB&fid=0x0:0xfcc7d9618f4116b1"],"When":"2024-11-15"},{"Name":"Carrie VanHoey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcdIMAyYNNeZIdjHLLSLKwWmMlmBW_coex6klJK2Md2_wze9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Unfortunately we were there on Halloween and the three of us got the BBQ pork chop special.  That night was the last night for that special.  It was not good.  They were very thin and so hard we could not cut them with steak knives.  We had to pick them up with our hands and tear off pieces.  The flavor was good but dry as wood.   The place was very loud with many sugar pumped trick or treaters.  It was our first time there and will give it another shot cause so many of our friends like it.  Hopefully it was just a bad night.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexander Babin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-Ld2yaJTlU8fYyqcKGAhD8wBXx1xKstMc5SUTHK-64BHtvkDO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very pleasantly surprised by this place! Everything we ordered was delicious. Had the sampler with ribs, pulled pork, and smoked chicken, as well as a few different sides. Meat was very good quality, and flavor and preparation were perfect. The sides were excellent, especially mac and cheese and the coleslaw.

In my opinion this place gives Slows a run for its money. The food here is just better. The service was super attentive, and prices are very reasonable. This is now our new favorite barbecue joint in the Detroit metro!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMYhEpMfdPLPsMMzXlDtDyJJozT692tOkY6X-yU&fid=0x0:0xfcc7d9618f4116b1"],"When":"2018-9-5"}]

[{"Name":"Jared May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVcgBwQbW0-yrVEedjKVcZEbR8zYZ0bm-0dPRHguXhycU9-rDG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My buddy and I were looking for a great burger on the way to Salmon Camp, we found this gem, and apparently it’s not a secret- but it’s one we hadn’t discovered. Definitely holds its place as one of the best burgers I’ve had in my life, and there are several good burger places close to my home town. You know it’s gonna be amazing when it can only seat like 15-20 people. The server, the cook, and staff were all awesome and welcoming of out of towner’s. A true Michigander gem tucked away in downtown Clare, you won’t be disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNE1GFTD1W6hL9IXHgoglpm9UtWhDlHQPdZtIDu&fid=0x0:0xc7c3280b8c0ebf13"],"When":"2024-10-1"},{"Name":"Allen Muma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrhxVEELiME9Yg8fbyVenPogFoEuTfhmpIxTiMt_1Rdvy0IJyI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of those historical restaurants you have to go get a burger at if you’re in the Clare area. While the place is small, and a little worn, the food is awesome, you get plenty of it, and the service is great. I have never had a bad meal there in 25 years!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP05xxJkjcGhy9lkLA1riuD9gg4bUXO0XmUH9IS&fid=0x0:0xc7c3280b8c0ebf13"],"When":"2024-10-3"},{"Name":"debfitts711","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0GdGyCmAQSEHSkYsPWJhLdOl1zeX-uy8YezO0WfFuFuDyQyuIig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had to visit this tiny historic restaurant to check it out. I'm so glad I did!! I ordered the Cherry Cheeseburger, which sounds strange, but was so delicious!! The food was wonderful, service was fast and friendly, and it was a great atmosphere. I will be back!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOLSZa9tzq1WKKoSMCaCF7ofOsCa0WQxXkAJqxp&fid=0x0:0xc7c3280b8c0ebf13"],"When":"2024-7-9"},{"Name":"Rich Shafer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9K9p9AQDvfsqzriO2D7UAEm3B1nT-Q5f8HestDeNYUrRZtjnVxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best burger I've had in a long time! Veteran owned business, and the people are so cool and down to earth. Huge portions for the price, and the coolest old lady cooks for you. Definitely going back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMggvOxBeWqP6h5-VcGrPCbSKLG3jbmxkCACUYi&fid=0x0:0xc7c3280b8c0ebf13"],"When":"2024-8-6"},{"Name":"Richard Hollobaugh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXG1fXDpFo_cl6CVnbVKKTL0VdamYvaSI6bBvLI7rexGRia75Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hashbrowns are perfection.  Light, moist, and not greasy.  Farmer's omelet is the best I've ever had, and that's my go-to omelet.   Homemade sourdough was just right.
I wish I lived closer to here!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephen Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4W5BKMcu8wI0pVhmiuPOctoi2trClHmLaA7wzKRXmXB2yHGQL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just wanna start off by saying absolutely delicious food never have let the family down with the great food definitely compliments to the chef and staff. We absolutely love coming to your restaurant for great food. And don't forget to snag your new holiday extra large coffee cups for your morning coffee during the holidays.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOxo79VqN_1ZXj3xIpQPDOoayBfvqu5aChaGQSa&fid=0x0:0xc7c3280b8c0ebf13"],"When":"2023-12-3"},{"Name":"T K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNCCORTeTLzTwFhf8xfxd04MZHo3jkfWjU7MIhX4O2Xr4ZiJU3Uw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place is nostalgic. It's a cool little building that has been there for a long time. Food is really good, sweet gal that minds the tables, it's great watching them cook and run the grill.

But damn it's grimey in the cooking area.
We always go back though!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly McMillen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq_EWBdURfriNdqaJvKvmJzozSkvpn8aEFPNDBQtUD3yciBHUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant is cozy and cute! Not alot of space but these people do quite well. There's an area where you can sit outside, and what's really cool, people will share their table with another person! I saw a lady offer to share her booth with a man who came in by himself. They both enjoyed their meal and had a great conversation by the looks of it! From what I understand this is common. How cool is that! The food was good, I ordered French toast with egg and hash browns. I couldn't finish it! Big serving sizes for the price! My daughter in law's order was put in wrong but it was taken care of right away! We really enjoyed coming here and will come here again if we are ever in the area.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aubry Dodge-Fry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5GpwMgI28AGzEZZsw866qXTv-VGnPMYDWCrNy0s5MMaLyiJHZgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is adorable. Looks like an awesome spot for a little party or celebration. The service was great. Hailey was warm and welcoming, attentive and helpful. The food was good, perhaps a bit over-priced. Big portions though. Hubby got a venison burger and said it was good, maybe could’ve used more aioli. He loved the fries. I couldn’t finish my chicken sandwich it was so big. The Old Fashioned was strong and yummy. We especially enjoyed the soft pretzel sticks with beer cheese. Staff checked to ensure we had a good experience. Good vibes:)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOpFlpg_you0cZapa0MeErLOhzoDpA4ApwLG3aT&fid=0x0:0x8744cca4fa1de21a"],"When":"2024-7-24"},{"Name":"Jill Nash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIT0zzZIv3Si4pO39zTxsHfs27moh4CgpRT-vZqfC8wMz3CoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the absolute best experience at MI Table! My husband and I stopped by with our 7 year old grandson. My grandson is a picky eater. Usually, it's chicken tenders or pizza for him. So you have to know he has eaten his share of chicken tenders. I'll just give you some of his quotes about his meal.  "These are the best tenders I have ever had", "I would eat these 24/7", "This is the best breading on the chicken", "10 out of 10 stars".

I had the Maple Salmon with Cheese Polenta and Brocollini.  My meal was superb!

My husband had the Vodka Pasta with Kielbasa. He said repeatedly during our meal how delicious his meal was.

Our food came out hot and the portions were generous.

Chaz was our server. He was amazing! Very attentive, friendly and he made us feel welcome the moment we walked into the restaurant.  He is quite an asset to your establishment.
We plan on making the drive from Howell next weekend.... just to dine at MI table. Hopefully, we will be able to have Chaz again as our server.

10 out of 10 from the 3 of us!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN3SbjoozGg7TuAFiPCOU_8Un29M3hmZhz3Y6c-&fid=0x0:0x8744cca4fa1de21a"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Robert Most","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5dBhm-2_PfNB3GozWUdDQBQdEOJUn17t4AUEyLGPwHsnb7X88=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Unique place in Bay City, complete with a bank vault.  We dined in the vault, which was a blessing because it served as a containment system for the two rug rats we had.  Otherwise they would have been harder to corral in the main dining area.   This was our second time here.  Six months ago I thought it had the best burger in the tri cities.  Now, not so much.  I got the same burger, but it was barely warm when I got it.  Although we ordered soup, they ran out, so most of our party didn’t get any.  The one bowl we got was cold for some reason.
So overall impression is that the food is not as good as it was six months ago, the vault is cool, and I hope they can bring this back to what it was.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM3mhNAo_2To4261e5AjstuKOFRmh19_1cBSar1&fid=0x0:0x8744cca4fa1de21a"],"When":"2024-12-29"},{"Name":"Lauren Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlAq-BN7Lli9o4nfD6m_tDwfue6TRx3iuB_D1VzrDQC9kDOSfe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I do NOT recommend this restaurant for people with allergies.  I went with a group in October for brunch. I made it clear to my server that I had a wheat (celiac disease)  and nut allergy. I ordered the farmer’s breakfast and the server let me know that the fried breakfast potatoes were in a shared wheat fryer so she asked for potatoes made in a skillet. When my food came, my potatoes were fried and clearly were the same as other people at the table. I let the server know and she agreed. I watched her take it back to the cook and he just shrugged her off with some words and ignored her.  She came back and said that he told her they were made in a skillet. I said, “I’m sorry but it’s clearly not true. I won’t have anything else.” It wasn’t her fault but I was very disturbed the cook tried to flat out lie regarding allergies. It’s 2024, grow up. I would not go here if you have any allergies.  For the price of fare, you would think there would be better service.  I had been in previous years and was fine but it looks like that’s no longer.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Quill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-HWQZHS3R7BRmtsuhdC91vpVGgZyyh0ieO-0FdX0Nm28XS23gLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best damned burger I've had in a long time. Cooked perfectly. Seasoned fries were crispy and tasty. If your in the Bay City area, highly recommended!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPh-5LlKXHV2kRQgO5vNiSI0q1ASrc_bDBwMMc4&fid=0x0:0x8744cca4fa1de21a"],"When":"2024-9-21"},{"Name":"Don Wilkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4z3QqFQBgN24CHgYArE1jCAAjR_e-Y9BdjpyKWdoIkOolZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The dining area is too large for the amount of diners they had making it feel cold. The maple glazed salmon I had was not glazed and was over cooked. There were only two servers for the entire restaurant and the food took forever to get. We ended up going to another restaurant because I was still hungry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha Garvie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTRHLq7IFMqk5uLdCHiBKONddnxNrviaFoXMFSmj87aKgsg50G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome local restaurant located in downtown Bay City! The restaurant is beautiful with a large open concept. The windows and decor make it very welcoming. I enjoyed hot coffee in a glass mug - the waitress did a great job of keeping my cup full the whole time. The menu was extensive and highlighted local farm to table options. We enjoyed the sourdough breakfast sandwich, which was made unique with chive cream cheese on it! Overall, it was a great meal at a reasonable price. I'm excited to come back and try more menu items!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPo-QdqEMuYfVw-k-iu2JvkeYchfw4ENJw3Wz8H&fid=0x0:0x8744cca4fa1de21a"],"When":"2023-12-5"},{"Name":"Jenae Prell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6cUQGE4vjD2y0tugeaSwGMlYMD8G7iQsSgn3-q84FJsJ1-WvG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love the atmosphere in here. Every time we stop by we get Emma as our server/bartender. She is the sweetest and always attentive to our table. She makes sure the best quality is always delivered to the table. I can not stress enough to stop in and try the amazing food however ask for Emma to be your server you will not be disappointed. She is absolutely the best and the main reason we go there so much!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Matt Hayes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe41cAPK3j-CRgW1sqCd0m3RajWvSF4XiKB_llY0V8NBsR7rQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Levant Kitchen is a small kebab and bowl shop that has amazing character and quality taste. In a shopping center that has every flavor available it is impressive to stand out.

Even during a busy rush and with a large take out order the staff were helpful and attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN-nl7AXOGn8Mdfbirev-ONz5YEqpEZqhQ9YZVN&fid=0x0:0x9f3610b86cb4cbcf"],"When":"2024-11-17"},{"Name":"G E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUkjyC_6b9Z0-e4KEPZpRcH-DyDKUrhekfHP4NQkgyGrRnvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I have been here a couple of times, while in the area, and the food is consistently good.  We now route trips to Michigan around Canton, so we can stop for food.

I have had the chicken shawarma wrap, and my wife had the half-rice/half-hummus chicken shawarma bowl, and I have started doing the same.

We get the bowls with all of the toppings.  The chicken shawarma is tender, well-seasoned, and flavorful, and the remaining toppings add great flavor and texture.  The shawarma bowl portions are huge and lasts us for at least two meals.  I highly recommend stopping by, as the food is delicious and fairly priced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPlPmrZ925iJJDGYVZEajJONFchRTk86r_kEn4o&fid=0x0:0x9f3610b86cb4cbcf"],"When":"2024-12-28"},{"Name":"Sara Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2kEsnQ1PI-efjTaSCVByV5G4k7fQj6VozQdmRG-H__3RI1A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Levant Kitchen is an absolute gem! From the moment you walk in, you're greeted by the enticing aroma of fresh Mediterranean cuisine. Their food is nothing short of spectacular – every dish is bursting with flavor, perfectly seasoned, and made with the freshest ingredients. The portions are *huge*, so you’ll always leave feeling satisfied (and with leftovers to enjoy later!).

My entire family loves this place – there’s something on the menu for everyone, from their mouthwatering shawarma wraps to their vibrant, perfectly dressed salads and creamy hummus. You can taste the care and quality in every bite.

If you're looking for a spot with generous portions, authentic Mediterranean flavors, and food that makes your taste buds dance, Levant Kitchen is the place to be. It’s a go-to for us and never disappoints! Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John McNulty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxrHtVadiFR3ITec8a1FxyAG50KcXDDyrspoaAd5_grOeoUmc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Levant Kitchen is absolutely incredible! These guys are rock stars when it comes to food and service. The food is beyond excellent—fresh, flavorful, and clearly made with care. Every dish I’ve tried has been outstanding. On top of that, the staff is so friendly and welcoming, making the whole experience even better. If you’re looking for a place that delivers amazing food with great vibes, this is it. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanaya Bose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyUn7DouORESS_g4priy89eBEYNasVo9HI1mjo1-zWQ_s8yaVL5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We recently tried this place for the first time and were really impressed! We ordered a bowl, and the food was absolutely delicious—even after bringing it home. The flavors were fresh and vibrant. The staff were incredibly friendly and took the time to explain the bowl and all the options, which made the experience even better. We’ll definitely be returning for more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMAdKHdkt2caWJkZPGJkuMVCTV7omyEzfSksIyB&fid=0x0:0x9f3610b86cb4cbcf"],"When":"2024-12-10"},{"Name":"Katie Toye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHYrDQimkny9_ou_0Roq5NhmExaZ85mLDwFgK-lcRBz4t3dXmf=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First time trying tonight. My husband is middle eastern.  I had to spit out my food and throw away. The chicken kabob sandwich was not good. The chicken was chewy and had a weird taste. My husband loves hummus and it was watery and had no flavor. We were really disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alan Frishman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXeeemXT1yIt8KHaV3uPCxzfF_pLkHFkdFiUixFzy0rs34-CgD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quaint little place tucked in a strip center. We chose this for the menu and the 4.7 stars. Can I say I was still surprised at how good everything was from the staff to the food and portion sizes? Yes. Yes I can. We look forward to our next visit. #GarlicWhip","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Salloum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHZt5BVadxDgCkn96SqkmmmCL9gSMoSpx2AVbQ-1084s9j-k0qIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are many places in Metro Detroit which make great shawarma sandwiches, but Levant is the BEST! Beyond their carry out service is an array of other foods which are absolutely fantastic! We enjoyed their food at a wedding and recently for a holiday party. Everything was moist, flavorful and delicious! Don’t forget to order a side of cauliflower!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMlf75IZeSRD7J3ymvc_fmHmq2d7E_5X3R7X6s-&fid=0x0:0x9f3610b86cb4cbcf"],"When":"2023-3-22"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Sweet November","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJS9KjJUEOSQckQ7qY0EVsCd8reqYU5Tzn7X4g2DUxVjDAAVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Second time dining here. Looks like they did some remodeling from last year, and the place looks great. Plus outdoor seating if you prefer. Our server was great, food was excellent. They do charge for pop refills, which is strange, but oh well. We had a great dinner and a great time. Will definitely be back next time we pass thru the area","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO0wBwWy9UZJOxm9YuH15_OoDVwjqsOB4TAA5mb\u0026fid=0x0:0x4bb68dbb7f408a5d"],"When":"2024-5-27"},{"Name":"M JS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2MsxBW1VdvUV2G0xaanNqk_kDQseRRdw53tNGvBeQanR7aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a typical, upscale bar/restaurant in a beautiful northern Michigan touristy town.   I had a Leelanau Salad - lettuce, grilled chicken, dried cherries, candied walnuts, red onions, blue cheese - a nice variation of a classic salad offered many places in Northern Michigan.  Also, very good cherry pie - of course, as cherry orchards abound in this area.  Service was great - wait staff was cheerful and efficient.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPuKewArStdFcZLym3MDmn-Jc6Il6_C8Z5Ahmxm\u0026fid=0x0:0x4bb68dbb7f408a5d"],"When":"2024-10-10"},{"Name":"Adam Fuller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjsyGryeNbhIumR9sIb8o6dHf3yjIUeMiD-Z_kOjWUkd8jIFui=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found this place years later than I should have early on Christmas Eve. The Popcorn Perch and Villager burger are both very tasty and highly recommended!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken Harrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXm4g-dqPM67oKzamdi0jXr8D6Q3i18RS6d7O4gSOuL57ofVLrhQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great outdoor patio with fireplace and bar. The salad with chicken was excellent. Large drink menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPJq1bv7dvzGCYKxQe0ol0OxDwCxx-jIhjcM8UL\u0026fid=0x0:0x4bb68dbb7f408a5d"],"When":"2024-7-23"},{"Name":"Cole Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwB0rhNtveDqzGexTKF_UUSmvoeVQJp97J07NN-2WyUST8V9iN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been going to this place for years, and all I have to say is that the VI has the best burgers in town. Easily. Not only that, but their wings are up there too if you pair them with ranch. They sell a variety of items, most very good. Although, I have noticed that the food quality had gone down a little bit. The service is quick and nice. Beautiful outdoor patio, even with a bar. Decent view as well. I personally love passing the short wait playing billiards in the back, very fun. Love this place, recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johanna Rohler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-CXETz5SX_WMg2deqCCxjeTPsKzORsRQf4lfY9G0D0sYvcw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quintessential small town cafe/pub. The burgers are excellent—I had the villager and it was truly wonderful! Highly recommend for anyone looking for a place to eat in the area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Andrus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4RGmBPqbNBKFZV94W3QwghMhyPeBQwAcnYVyD_0F2kNyDyXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped in pretty late on a Sunday after trying a few other places and told the kitchen was closed. VI welcomed us in with amazing service from Becky behind the bar and our server Adam.  Food was great and after some nice conversation we got a bill was very reasonable.  We also signed up for a points system with VI and Fiddleheads (which I forgot about 🫣) and it was applied to our bill last night and just topped everything off perfectly.  With prices going up and restaurants struggling to keep up……these guys are crushing it and doing great things.  Thank you to you all at the VI  😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Now","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWsr7BVHMPQfhLb1qAHn92bdiXb6nbu9Wie3zoFjFBvlQd4pu8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I guess we were her last year at the same time but I must have been too hammered to remember. I recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMdmP0GS9BtoHXxeDGRr3vbtI9fZISCQqRLwQRb\u0026fid=0x0:0x4bb68dbb7f408a5d"],"When":"2023-2-18"}]

[{"Name":"Lasan A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVteU2ur7QoYL7Oj476QjcPSpU8uJQR65QJTgD-yDKRUPUI_fG3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dropped by for a Saturday morning breakfast. Pleasantly surprised. Clean and organized place. Ordered the Omelette lovers and Mexican omelette and apple juice. Free Coffee with breakfast and the coffee was amazing. Food was delicious and came out quick. Amazing service and the servers were really nice. The menu could have some more information. Mexican omelette came with ground beef which wasn't mentioned on the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN1xcdYnFGbgYoLXxYz-oSG9RSmk69gu8sH6Zbn&fid=0x0:0x143c182ec315fb5c"],"When":"2023-5-8"},{"Name":"Laurie Soda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5rf2VEg3sBJCE1xKPttCIHtdNXwKTjkNCtwj7EdRicNs5QUHK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Delicious broasted chicken with very good fries and coleslaw. I would rate higher but there is no online menu so you just have to go and check it out. I’m going again for sure","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM6HHd6wGWwbi3P_i8XRBt8jXMg9Hm1KCDdzdXr&fid=0x0:0x143c182ec315fb5c"],"When":"2022-5-31"},{"Name":"Dan M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuN0dVusJUyDL8ArchzSXhPMUVLwve6I9IwZoRQuR4iuy7x6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Attended a reception here and was super happy to discover they serve authentic Broasted Chicken, the best way to cook chicken. They did not disappoint as the chicken was outstanding. Pasta with a meat sauce was also very good, decent amount of meat and great tasting, not like a tube of tomatoe paste like so many other places. Service for the reception was excellent. I can't wait to go back to the restaurant. Broasted Chicken is hard to find, so I'll likely be back often.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"josie bee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk7Vxdvc3CsJg1X3E6JXfVT8lBSvS43XJ1VSZ5C6Es1ufQNA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We booked the hall for an event of roughly 80 people. We paid 35$ a plate. The food was taken away before I, the host, could sit and eat properly (I was greeting each table). The only food I had was a bit of salad and less than a handful of pasta that my husband put on my plate before I started greeting guests. The food that was left over - we were initially told everyone ate everything. I knew this was untrue as our table had trays of food left, I didn't eat, 2 guests didn't show up and guests that were up for drink or chasing their children complained that their plates were gone before they could finish. Eventually they told my husband that the food was thrown away. Even the food we provided, that they had no right to throw away. So the first explanation was not true essentially. I doubt the food was thrown away, but that's just my opinion.
The servers shouldn't have taken food away until EVERYONE at the table was done eating - or at least asked if they could take plates and serving trays of food away. Essentially I paid 35 for my plate and ate less than 5$ worth of food. I'm happy with everything, including the friendliness of the staff, with the exception of the service and the untruth told to us about what happened to the remaining food. If you book this hall make sure to specify you want the leftover food (my mother in law did to the server but they did not listen). And also to make sure to mention for them not to clear tables until guests have finished - asking each table if they are done. Also we paid per head for a bartender and instead they had a waitress hop in when she could to serve guests. My husband was behind the bar quite a bit serving our guests, so make sure if you pay for that fee that they provide someone who will have time to serve the guests.
I'm happy with some aspects and unhappy with other aspects. Especially the dishonesty in what happened to the extra food, and throwing away food that we had provided that they didn't have a right to throw away.

EDIT:
As the owner replied that food was "unlimited", why would I not eat as the host of the event in that case? Also, when we paid, you may have us confused with someone else. We received no food at all. Not that night, not when we paid, we received nothing "extra" and our food was not "unlimited". It was quite the opposite - taken away before we finished eating.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Slushi (Rum Runner)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0UQLlN2hoirKI8jedoPkcNG5B116mN3wxpefYRd5g2aIKMVjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Go here, trust me, huge helpings, not too expensive, and amazing bar, does not disappoint, amazing Mac & Cheese and Meatloaf, 10/10 would recommend to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katie Foster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIO6hCphfi5WDTglWYhggZlq1-07u4TijoxkrDj6qyxgk-779U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for an affordable Mother's day dinner for 7 people. I had to work til 3 o'clock so making dinner wasn't an option. Someone I know recommended The Michigan Bar and Grill. We literally live around the corner but have never been. I had called 3 times to get my order in and kinda felt like a nuisance but the ladies were literally so kind to me. My parents went the next day to pickup the food. They said how awesome the 2 ladies working were, Lori and Marilyn. My mom was a goofy goober and accidently tipped .10 cents instead of $10 they informed me we wouldn't be able to go back. My mother was embarrassed. I called the restaurant and offered to etransfer. Lori again was so kind and just simply said Happy Mothers day. I know this will be a regular spot for me and my family. I promise we will be better tippers in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIK4rpw3LtHhWtzcZNzJxKJOZKow0xOz_fTci_4Y7nTZ4BYjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have tried a number of places for breakfast. This place is, by far, the best for breakfast. Always cooked perfectly, plus the service is great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven Chauvin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUewUvugUA1gai88wPmiBQly3fRj3oou3EMbM2WbixbdsS0rog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was there month ago. Food Was great was for a event in the back hall. No complaints other then staff should know more about what their serving. And gravy is ment to be put in separate containers vs in same container","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Biancaboss “Biancabossxo” Xo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsFnb90JrqPngGzmoPiW8ATCRexgFm84brlm5nbGaktpw08p3VvA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately I was not pleased with the food at all . Let me first start off by saying our waiter was wonderful because I’m sure the actual food was not his fault . We came for my mother in laws birthday and true food was very under par , we started off with a charcuterie board which was Very mediocre ( the carrots in the pickled onions were extremely tough to chew through ) .1) I then ordered what I thought was a lamb shank and ended up being meat balls and “ risotto “ which was a scoop of rice and nothing like risotto 2) My husband had “ Risotto “ and I’m sorry but it looked like a scoop of jambalaya . Finally my mother in laws meal was fish, and she enjoyed it but to be honest the portions were extremely small for the price it’s listed for .  The dessert was for free which I appreciate but the chocolate cake was extremely extremely bitter and tasted like it was store bought and not freshly made at all ! I get it’s a college town but the portions were very small and very overpriced and to me it wasn’t fair at all . They need to up the portions or lower the price especially if you have college students who don’t have the money to enjoy a good quality meal . I will not be returning to this place and it breaks my core to write this review but I’m very direct and I’m not fake .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOaVUVts1aHVb6eDwRB2eBozLIxQkRj6PHsyKN6&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-9-26"},{"Name":"Pretty Cash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzv2YI-RrFK122BrSk5_1J2d7maXt2Sm4-Wcu4qobozbGVdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had Brunch on a Sunday Morning
It was incredibly busy so there were very long waits. My party of 5 arrived at 9:30 and waited 30 minutes. By the time we were seated the wait was 1.5 for larger parties. So come early!
They don’t offer traditional coke or Pepsi they serve some other cola. The coffee was very weak not worth it getting.
The pancakes are the best pancakes I’ve ever eaten in my life! So good. The downside is if you don’t want the charred lemon butter and want plain butter instead they charge you $1 for it.
The waffles were hard, burnt and cold do not recommend. The chicken breast was fried to perfection and very tasty! The French toast was such an interesting delicious dish. Bacon was really good!
The cheesy grits were just okay.
Overall I would definitely come back just for those pancakes! Our server was kind but very busy. The hostess’s were very kind and gave us menu suggestions while we waited! Definitely give this place a try! It’s on the expensive side but every once in a while is a good treat!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN2hwp6Wanx8FJvCv4FEqs_LUSCu8xNE5gAJ2l5&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-11-5"},{"Name":"Yosef Montgomery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaqCxyicdjFIhNlv8RWsKkTjUR6ECrBaatIjJrxHiKD9MHQYl4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are in the MSU area and you need a quick bite to eat from a solid burger joint, then People’s Kitchen may be perfect for you. Everyone one at our table got the same burger and smash potatoes. We were all very satisfied. The restaurant is pretty big with both patio, indoor & bar seating available. Also shouts out to the waiter she was super nice and patience with us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMYakGaJB7PGK3EKPxlMsZFp7P8zXf1FZvpJ09r&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-8-28"},{"Name":"Justina Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbzQB_T5C1pGl8Y8hEc70jYsC3K4CzJQYiRSAaJdXRtHhDVdZH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their menu is a little different but the food I tried was very good and their drink menu had a lot of delicious options. The staff were excellent and the food came in great timing. This is a wonderful place to go to try something new and different! We also went to the breakout escape rooms next door after our meal. It was a really great time and I love that they were so close, that made it very convenient!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOpwuRA4mtbM6ppNKXjAOU8Gxm7Op-TecA5SU2F&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-8-28"},{"Name":"Breit M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0nfbAryZeX_-o5gky2zgJQ8-Olc3tCtSuiNfEKmqAea-tCLUCOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant was an excellent experience. Went on Sunday around 10, not too busy, first time. The atmosphere was cool, a bit of loud electronic music but nice vintage decor. Food was excellent, had a Vietnamese coffee and Bene, both very tasty. Definitely a place to come back and try the other food in the menu.

To improve: Maybe add a changing table in the men’s bathroom.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNAg96423dXhvl7bA1YPw-IozFh8i99uYG-Ow_q&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Melanie Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViS8vJ3zqjz1ZVvGVy3hwx9e8MrkYCDXNG8NahdtRar9maQfza=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was excellent! Had the chicken and waffles   Wait for food was kind of long but the food was worth it. Only one complaint..music was a bit loud. We could really hear each other talking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMhWmn-FUnlSEnEXgzyKTYS5_KufWpSZXYMEtD0&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-10-1"},{"Name":"B Lipka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7Vs4GlEb43ThKbaM2bcBq2IkKTEy1lHdjuHg8dX1Kmuz7GTo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was excellent for an evening dinner. I had the chicken and it was absolutely delicious.  The zucchini and  mushrooms  were tasty. I was excited to see that the Chef catered to allergies. The atmosphere was chic industrial.  Many different alcohols to choose from. The staff were very friendly. Josh was our server and he did an excellent job providing our requests with a smile.  He was also informative and helpful when requesting special dietary changes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMz24OMqmFR4if03tTUy1KqI4wDYk5ZOyMJTm64&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-4-2"},{"Name":"Christopher Albers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDZJmySQ2ZRUMHoLFWnt22-Ju1QVhML03L-kk3dxYOXtHiLF1m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'd only heard good things from people in the area.  They were not exaggerating.  This was delicious and may be my favorite brunch place in the region.

Had a Vietnamese coffee and eggs Benedict.  And getting a good portion of bread, egg, and short rib in each bite was nice and balanced.  Was very happy with my choices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOd5wxpUsbFPqO_P0377WJy5f_a6kZrz91_hoE_&fid=0x0:0x4d1c3be2bd178c65"],"When":"2024-7-13"}]
